description:
Train units from your Wonder to fight and capture the centre tree to get points. Get enough points to level up and pick better units. Losses give you favour for god powers to allow you to catch up. Destroy the other player's Wonders to win! 
 
Random unit choices and god powers available each game helps mix up the gameplay and the random map format means it supports any player count. 
 
Good luck in your battles!

For feedback and discussions please visit my Discord: <url="https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn">https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn</url>

Land in a deserted land with ancient relics of power. Explore and pick them up to get units, powers, abilities, and upgrades. Use these to destroy the other players. Beware however as the land is unstable and a great fire wall is coming in forcing everyone together to battle for the ultimate domination! 
 
Features randomly generated lands with a large pool of collectibles to find leading to lots of gameplay variety. May the relics always be in your favour!

For feedback and discussions please visit my Discord: <url="https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn">https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn</url>

Fight in rounds where each round you have 60 seconds to build up an army of units to fight. Then when the time is up they are all transported to the area to fight to death. Watchout however as you cannot see what the opponents (Only allies) picked so bring on the mindgames of trying to figure out what they picked in order to counter them! 
 
Features different unit pools, powers, and arenas every round to mix things up as well as a gold spending escalation.

For feedback and discussions please visit my Discord: <url="https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn">https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn</url>

Start with your castle being able to train a single type of unit depending on the civilisation. Focus on the enemies who are training the units that you counter and avoid the enemies that counter you. Get kills to receive gold to allow training of premium units which the gold rate increases as you get more gold. 
 
In addition to gold from kills you will receive favour. These can be used to cast spells at the location of your witch Circe who is a powerful hero. She has the ability to twist up the gameplay which when used well can give you an edge in battle - however use her carefully as she can be knocked out and you cannot cast spells again until you revive her! 
 
Support all player counts and mixes up the spells and the premium myth units to add some variety to the gameplay. Good luck in your battles!

For feedback and discussions please visit my Discord: <url="https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn">https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn</url>

Allows you to research most upgrades in the game three times, stacking their effects.   
   
This does not affect all upgrades, and some effects of upgrades aren't included or won't work if researched multiple times. Affected upgrades have numbered names (eg "Pickaxe 2"). The AI does play with and gets at least some of the extra upgrades, though I think it does make the game easier.

Allows you to add beautiful decorations and non-functional buildings into your gameplay. Simply train the new builder unit from your Town Center, and then start creating your ideal village! You can place paths, bushes, statues, tents, flowers, flags, fountains, signs, torches, market stalls, and much more!

Click the 'Next' button in the bottom left of the building panel to access three pages of embellishments!

Lets you play with resources at the bottom left, just like the original games. Compatible with ranked multiplayer! This needs the alternative resource layout option enabled (Settings -> UI -> Enable alternative HUD layout), otherwise Bad Things may happen to your UI.  
  
Also, when in observer mode, shifts the command panel slightly further over to the right, so that both the observer switch player/pause/play commands and the normal command panel are visible at the same time.  
  
I have no idea how nicely this plays with different resolutions or UI scaling.

A fiendish and difficult challenge awaits you! This mod contains a random map (no computer players).
Battle and jump across the void in order to defeat The Eternity Lord. He isn't going down without a fight, so you will need to avoid attacks, traps and beasts that all want you to fall into oblivion. Checkpoints are included.

An auto escape map where you are hiding around a strange forest trying to survive waves of enemy attacks and powers cast in your base. Get kills and fish to get food and upgrade your defences at the armoury to keep the edge. 
 
Some enemies when killed will drop relics that will quickly disappear. Grab these with urgent priority as these will give you major bonuses but be careful as they will often drop in very danerous locations meaning it can be risky to pick them up! 
 
Survive long enough to be able to get payback on the enemies attacking you for the win. 
 
When hosting ensure that the last player is an AI player who is going to be the one hunting you down. The map itself otherwise supports any number of players.

For feedback and discussions please visit my Discord: <url="https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn">https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn</url>

Attain the favor of the gods and become victorious by capturing the precious Relic sitting at the top of the hill at the center.

The Relic at the Center does not sit undefended: it's protected by towers capable of freezing any of your soliders or mythical creatures. Bear that in mind before approaching the hill where your ultimate prize will be found!

Set sail to the infamous and mysterious Deception Island in the Southern Arctic, where nothing is what it seems to be and even your own knowledge may deceive you.

Available resources and overall land for expanding your dominion may be scarce, and, at times maybe even deceptive, but additional resources may be found on the shipwrecks scattered around the island.

Oct 10th, 2024: Uploaded updated version to fix loading issue due to recent RM library changes.

WORK IN PROGRESS ALPHA 
 
WARNING: This is work in progress and updates may be breaking. Use with caution and have understanding 
 
This is a work in progress trigger pack I have developed for Retold adding a lot of new functionality, shortcuts, conditionals, and other functionality to the game for use on maps. Added triggers to maps should work fine online even for people without the mod. 
 
OVERVIEW ON SYNTAX 
 
Triggers with NTL need to have a special trigger insert called "Initialise: Nottud Trigger Loader" insert into its own trigger as the first trigger on the map before they will function. That is because the loader provides some systems and dependencies the NTL triggers use to work. 
 
If a trigger effect has { in the name that means end effect with } must be used to close off. This is mainly the case with the "If | Something {" trigger sets where it defines trigger effect code that conditionally runs which must have a corresponding "If | End }". Similar with loops. 
 
If a trigger effect has a -> { this this indicates it is a lambda function meaning that the code will run an unknown number of times both now and potentially in the future depending on what it is. Unlike in EE for trigger sets such as ySearch (Now called unit group), these usually just have to be called once rather than put into a looping trigger. With lambda triggers you cannot pass non local variables through due to a game limitation - so instead create a Parameters variable and use the special Parameters version of the lambda triggers to pass through data. 
 
One special case to mention is condition "Dynamic Trigger NTL: For Each Player Start -> {" which is a condition and effect "Dynamic Trigger NTL: For Each Player End }" is a special wrapper that should be put as the first condition/last effect allowing the entire trigger to be wrapped and emulated to work for every player in a range independently with a variable for the player. 

Have fun designing!

For feedback and discussions please visit my Discord: <url="https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn">https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn</url>

Updated The classic flash game comes to AoM! This is a random map file so you can choose the number of players, play over 3 rounds to find the champion. This map only works with over 2 human players. Created by Yeebaagooon.
This mod restores the original voice acting from the old game campaigns :).

Lets you play with resources at the bottom left, this version also has the resources ordered like the original games. Compatible with ranked multiplayer! This needs the alternative resource layout option enabled (Settings -> UI -> Enable alternative HUD layout), otherwise Bad Things may happen to your UI.  
  
Also, when in observer mode, shifts the command panel slightly further over to the right, so that both the observer switch player/pause/play commands and the normal command panel are visible at the same time.  
  
I have no idea how nicely this plays with different resolutions or UI scaling.

Defend your temple from waves of attacks against it. Train dwarves from the temple to wood piles to collect from them and then build defences. At your temple enter the shop and purchase upgrades for your defences and economy. You have only hold 6 upgrades at the temple so choose carefully what your pick. 
 
As you get more gold you can rank up tthe upgrades and replace with new higher quality upgrades. 
 
Build an armoury and perform researches there to unlock new abilities and options to play with to give you an edge in battle. Things include temple defences, god powers, mirror towers, and archive to store additional upgrades. 
 
Good luck with your survival!

modName: God Powers Zero Costs - By Nergico
description:
(Additive Mod) 

This mod ensures that god powers no longer cost Favor. They only have the cooldown.

Additionally, I have created another mod where the cooldown is set to zero, allowing you to spam god powers without any pause: https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/316932/

As soon as new god powers are added to the game, I will update the mod. Please note that new god powers will not be directly affected by the mod until I have updated it.

This mod is additive, meaning it should continue to work normally after updates and should not conflict with other mods.

If something doesn't work or you'd like to give feedback, feel free to let me know.
You can reach me on the official AOM Discord server under Nergico.

Unfortunately, the mod received some bad reviews at the beginning because I had an error in the coding which has now been fixed. If something doesn’t work, please don’t rate the mod badly right away, but contact me on Discord and describe the error. I will try to fix it.

If you would like to support me, I would greatly appreciate a donation for the hard work!
https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=SR3LW4CCUVBPN

modName: WRP World Role Play MOD (by agentadkiller ADRIEN)
description:
ahoy ! 
 
SANDBOX: World Role Play MOD = a way to roleplay on ANY maps ! 
 
HOW TO: the mod unit "builder" (forkbeard variant) is trainable in village center, town center, citadel center ! 
(IMPORTANT CHINESE NOTE: you have to click the terracota in TC to get forkbeard ! and fuxi loses access to the youngest nezha) 
a new "random relic spawner" (non-hero athena variant with circe voice) is trainable from shrine, spawning relic on death (70%) 
 
WRP is originally a type of sandbox scenario where you freely role play anything you want with other players 
 
join our discord WRP community to (role)play together and learn with great people ! you can add me if you need ! 
 
CHANGES: 
 
=> full credits to the great modder for the base code from "embellishment and construction builder" and ideas 
that means that her mod is fully included in my version and a LOT more ! 
 
=> LIMITS 
- mercenaries, boars and undead lifespan is now infinite 
- units and building with a limits got x10 higher limits (houses/manors x100, allowing A LOT MORE POP) 
- tents do +100 population 
note: default game max population is 1000 editor maps can any number 
(WARNING: DONT USE "DEVASD" CHEAT CODE locking you at 200 max pop) 
 
=> reworked the builder's pages (and added more !) 
- page 1 is a lot of natural cosmetics (trees, flowers...) 
- page 2 is a lot of civilized cosmetics (flags, tanner racks...) 
- page 3 is nearly all statues (including cosmetic egyptian monuments) 
- page 4 is civ specific cosmetics WITH ALL CHOICES (ruines, columns, torches...) 
- page 5 is nearly all campaign buildings (trojan walls, monuments, osiris pyramid: detroyed version stays !) 
- page 6 is more unique buildings, most with ALL TRAINING choices ! (heroes, villagers, shades, minions, roc...) 
- page 7 is with other stuff (load of useful campaign assets and some objects...) 
- page 8 is a lot of fire (all sizes) and china buildings (great wall and campaign) 
- page 9 is corpses, area VFX fire/mist/rain/snow and lot of chinese cosmetics from campaign ! 
(IMPORTANT WARNING: VFX can be deleted but do not always have a visual entity, so double click one to select all !) 
- page 10 is nearly all chinese cosmetics (drum, waterwell, goldpile and more !) 
- page 11 is most china variants of trees and rocks (bamboo, stalagmite, rocks with symbols...) 
- no new page since japanese update (yet), i may wait aztecs to make a full new page ! 
 
=> a lot of the building choice have no restriction to place ! 
 
=> all new tents + shrine + shipyard allow you to train all untrainable units and heroes 
- all heroes from any campaigns and editor (including titans like gaia) 
- all villagers type and most regular heroes (including the argo, ox cart...) 
- all special and unique units (including raven, valkyrie horse, pirates hips, and more !) 
- all cut units and some campaign or cheat units are in some buildings ! 
- all Town Center units (including priest, mercenaries... priests and berserks are removed from TC) 
- all naval myth units (moved from docks to be in shipyard) 
- new temples variants allowing all myth units and their specific myth-unit-tech 
 
=> UNITS 
- default temple has an arbitrary (mostly "undead") selection of myth-units 
- all atlantean units in heros version are in manor with some extras (valkyrie and hippeus horses !) 
- all regular greek heroes are moved to shrine with shades, minions and campaign automatons 
- all campaign units have training time when they didnt have initially 
- all units of the game cost -2 population (they can go to 0 !) 
- all titan sized units are amphibious with colossus, argus, fafnir, jotuns, petsobek and behemoths 
- all fortresses, wonders and towers can be placed "anywhere" (like the farms or lighthouse) 
 
=> TECHS: 
- all priests can convert animals and empower buildings 
- trainable pharaohs get access to various animals of set 
- boosted stats of campaign's giant siege ballista 
- "shaft of plague" tech is available if you take anubis (poison units theme !) 
- "advanced defense" tech is for all factions ! 
 
=> NOW: what has NOT changed ? 
- day/night is not needed because CHEAT CODE CAN CHANGE IT (enable cheat codes !) 
- God Powers are heavily improved, and we have CHEAT CODES to change anytime (enable cheat codes !) 
 
have fun ! 
 
UPDATE 11/02/2026: japanese update + demeter update (finally !) 
- normal temple has now a unique fixed roster including kuafus 
- shades and minion are moved to egyptian temple 
- added campaign clan members and shinobi one kenobi to the dojo 
- added editor cut unit: bushiyari to guardhouse and qingqi to baolei 
- adapted to demeter god pack: 
=> added the new heros to shrine 
=> thorned wall tech is available to everyone (special skin applies only to greek walls) 
=> pan, hestia and persephone myth unit are in atlantean manor (with their tech) 
=> adapted fortress edits to demeter (moved harpy a bit) 
- adapted to japanese units and buildings: 
=> japanese temple got most myths and their techs 
=> japanese tent adds a lot of campaign heroes and special units 
=> all japanese variants of existing embellishments are added 
=> wretch got infinite lifespan 
=> japanese castle can be placed anywhere 
=> oni are amphibious 
- automaton SPC moved to armory 
- dojo trains clan members and shinobi one kenobi 
- guard house gets cut unit bushi yari 
- baolei gets cut cav unit qingqi 
NOTE: no new cosmetics are added (yet), there are not a lot of new one (i may wait aztecs to make a new cosmetic page) 
 
NEW UPDATE 12/02/2026: training optimisation ! moving units and sorted better 
- atlantean manor back to only heroes 
- hamadryad and siren back to normal temple 
- lykaon villager in modded atlantean temple 
- valkyrie in modded norse temple 
- fafnir and golden board in norse tent 
- towncenter gets raven and harpySPC and the custom relicspawner 
- wretch in modded egyptian temple 
- kappa in shrine 
- FIXED hades shade not appearing in modded egyptian temple

Transforms Kronos into a more visually striking and faithful representation of the original artwork. The rocks that make up his form are given a more earthy brown tone, while the glowing lines that once emitted a purple color are changed to a vibrant orange, alluding to the lava from which he is made.

Four Runners, One Hunter. Can the Runners survive 10 minutes? Can the Hunter chase them down? With an array of God Powers at their disposal, the Hunter must kill all 4 Runners before the 10 minutes are up. Both have god powers at their disposal, who will prevail? Hunters are either chosen at random or by the host.

========!重要!========

本翻譯修改主要為將一些翻譯名詞修改為個人偏好的版本，主要依循古希臘語讀音、其次根據常用譯名，例如希臘火神「希費德斯」修改為「赫菲斯托斯」，月神「阿緹蜜絲」修改為「阿耳忒彌斯」，「大力士（英雄）」修改為「赫拉克勒斯（英雄）」，「傑森（英雄）」修改為「伊阿宋（英雄）」等等。翻譯帶有個人偏好，許多譯名並不遵循原版《神話世紀》中文翻譯，請斟酌使用。

戰役有少量對話正在持續重譯中，建議搭配英文語音模組：「English Voices in Campaigns」

目前只修改了少部份內容。翻譯修改項目列表：https://bit.ly/aomr-zh

========其他翻譯修正========

  • 學習頁面「花神芙羅拉」修正為「植物群」。
  • 科技樹頁面「傳說」修正為「圖示」。
  • 中文標點符號修改為全形。
  • 其他修正請見連結

Building limits have been increased and population counts lowered for most units, allowing armies to reach twice their original size. House building limits have also been doubled. To prevent mass spamming, most siege units now have individual building limits. This mod is designed for players who desire larger armies without excessive chaos. modName: Unlimited Pop  Enhanced Wood and Gold Mines
description:
Sets all population to 0 (unlimited pop).

All trees (except Tamarisk) are set to 6500.

 

*** NOTE IN CASE IT DOESN'T WORK:

If this mod is not working for you, try disabling all other mods and try it then.

Age of Mythology uses a file called "proto.xml" for the stats on every unit/resource in the game. This means if another mod alters the "proto.xml", only one of those mods will work. 

If you wish to have a specific mod paired with another mod, let me know in the comments. I will attempt to merge them and make a separate mod for it.

I've always loved the aesthetic of Alfheim, and was disappointed to see that Retold changes it to look completely different. In fact, it looks almost identical to the new map Mirkwood. I like to have a bit of variety, so this mod restores the classic look of Alfheim from the original game:

  • The map will have pine trees instead of autumnal oak foliage. 
  • The lighting has been changed to recreate the ethereal golden light that was in the original.
  • The load screen image has been updated to reflected the changed appearance.

I've left the Nordic-style columns in though, since that change makes perfect sense.

Adjusted AI attack intervals from 3 minutes to 6 minutes. Why? Because they annoyed me with their constant spamming. Please note that the AI also considers travel distance into their attack intervals. If it takes 3 minutes for their army to reach your base they will leave 3 minutes early to reach you in time for the attack interval. This is why it feels like we never get a chance to breathe and recover after they attack. The AI is also set to cheat by the devs. They always know where you are at, at all times on all difficulty levels. Even if they never scouted your area. The AI are also set by the devs to prioritize the human player as the "most hated" enemy on the map. Which causes them to attack the player extremely often more than other AI enemies.

If players are playing on vanilla without mods and want any chance at survival against HARD and beyond difficulty AI they must reach the second age by the 4 minute mark and have a small army and/or walls ready by the 6 minute mark, to have any chance at survival without other players intervening to save them. After the AI reaches the second age their attack timer will begin to tick. You will almost 99.99% see enemy troops at your base by the 6 minute mark. The AI will attack you every 3 minutes with travel time included which means this 3 minutes will ultimately feel more like 1 to 2 minutes of them constantly attacking you. AI also receives 25% to 50% resouce bonuses after TITAN difficulty. Any other diificulty below TITAN, the AI will play normally with the exception of them cheating and knowing where all human players are at. At ALL times on ALL difficulty levels.

Queen's Gambit offers a unique spin on Chess, Regicide, and King of the Hill. In this game, the King trains specialized 'Chess Pieces,' while the Queen focuses on training basic units, all with the ultimate goal of defeating opposing Kings to claim victory. Each unit has specific abilities, so strategic consideration is crucial. The map, randomly generated for each match, can accommodate any number of teams and players. Control the center of the map to gain favor, which can be used to purchase upgrades and units at your Temple.

This is my first Random Map for AoM:Retold. So any feedback and questions are welcome! 

If you encounter any bugs, glitches, or issues please contact me on Steam or head over the aom heavengames forums.

Play age of mythology in the land from Red, Blue and Yellow!

For up to and including 12 players.

Every time you play, the map will spawn different combinations of resources, but the town center locations will always remain the same.

There are multiple maps in this mod for you to choose from:

  • Kanto [Zelda] - plays like any Zelda map, starting with a ceasefire and 2 atlantean hero villagers with a roc.
    • 2xR - Double the resource spawns! Double the fun!
    • Inf - Everyone has infinite non favor resources in their bank!
  • Kanto [Nomad] - plays similar to nomad, each player starts with 2 atlantean villagers at semirandom locations.
    • 2xR - Double the resource spawns! 
    • Inf - Everyone has infinite non favor resources in their bank!

I hope these maps add some fun and spice to your Zelda games! Look forward to the other regions in the future!
If you have any suggestions, you can either leave them on aom heavengames or the ageofempires.com comments section.

Enjoy!

~onealmond

This mod makes pigs, goats and cows available to train. 
You need to be in the classical age to train them. 
 
This mod was inspired by AoE3 since you can train animals from the farms in it, I didn't like the constant transisition from being able to train herdable animals to not being able to. Hence!... this mod was made. 
 
The Greeks and Egyptions train them from the granary. 
The Norse train them from ox carts. 
And the Atlanteans train them from economic guilds. 
 
It also makes granaries, economic guilds and storage pits have a gather flag. 
 
Costs: 
Pigs = 30 Food, 50 Gold. 
Goats = 30 Food, 50 Gold. 
Cows = 50 Food, 75 Gold. 
 
All the animals give the same amount of food as in vanilla. 
Animal | Starting Food | Max Food 
Pigs | 50 Food | 300 Gold 
Goats | 50 Food | 300 Gold 
Cows | 75 Food | 400 Gold

Revives the visual format from the beta, where units change their armor appearance based on upgrades researched in the armory, such as Copper, Bronze, and Iron. Meanwhile, technologies like Medium, Heavy, and Champion only alter the unit's helmet. The combinations of armory upgrades and unit ranks create spectacular visual variations, making a Champion Hoplite look different with Copper compared to Iron. This mod only affects Greeks, Egyptians, Norse, and Atlanteans; it is unknown if future civilizations will support this feature.

I leave as an example in the screenshots the combination of Champion Greek Military Units + their updates in None, Copper, Bronze and Iron Armor, Shield and Weapon.

Base: 
- Myth units and Heroes cost much more and are much stronger  
- Human military units and military buildings have more hitpoints
- Many buildings, units and techs are buildable from the beginning 
- All range units can attack further, especially ranged siege units 
- All units except for mechanical units (siege/navy) slowly regenerate. 
- Minions, Mercenaries and Terracotas do not have a limited life spans 
- Houses and Town Centers provided more population 
- Walls are much stronger, gates are weak points
 
Upcoming: 
(WIP) All Myth Units and Heroes have special attacks
(WIP) God power changes which allows them to be used more
(WIP) Some myth units can walk through water (Colossus)
(WIP) Transport ships can be used to trade between docks and a market place. 
(WIP) Greeks: Militia and Cataphracts are trainable. Militia at the watch tower and Cataphracts at stable. Kataskopos trainable. Can build shrines for favor trickle. 
(WIP) Egyptians: Minions are trainable at monuments and obselisks. Egyptian Archer, Egyptian Scout trainable. Can build shrines for favor trickle. 
(WIP) Norse: Can create campfires (new mini-building) and train wolves & bears. Hero of Ragnarok is trainable at the temple (Age 4). Nordic Scout & Hirdman trainable. Can also build Dwarven Forges for gold trickle. 
(WIP) Atlantean: Tartarian Spawn are trainable at temples. 
(WIP) Chinese: Need to play them more to see what I should add

Hello! My name is Albanesi, and welcome to my Settlers mod (Currently in Beta).

I was a huge fan of Settlers back in the day and wanted to recreate it from memory for Age of Mythology: Retold. This is the first beta version, and I plan to update it with more details, balance changes, custom bosses, and powerful relics.

This map is designed for 8 players. Everyone starts with the same amount of resources and villagers. At the moment, all Gods are allowed, but I will be rebalancing the mod (e.g., Eagle Drops, Underworld Passages, etc.).

I'm always open to feedback! Please feel free to DM me on Discord with any suggestions or ideas: albanesi.

Team up with friends and pick a hero to fight it out in 6 different worlds. Pick and choose your skills and try and synergise with your teamates to make the ultimate fighting squad. Survive the round and defeat the boss to be sent back to the shop where you can level up your skills even further. After the 6 worlds you will be pitted against the ultimate boss - have you got what it takes to survive and win?! 
 
Each hero comes with a variety of skills and playstyles and the worlds generated are random providing a lot of replay value. All skills come without limits to encourage you to experiment with different builds. 
 
Hosting Instructions 
All players except the last should be human. The god and teams are set automatically ingame.

For feedback and discussions please visit my Discord: <url="https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn">https://discord.gg/FfYbbFTmyn</url>

modName: ADDITIVE MOD: No Buildlimit, More Resources, Less Pop Count and 2 OP Techs
description:
Features:

Additive Modding: This mod integrates seamlessly into your modlist, ensuring compatibility with other mods and avoiding conflicts.

If you want to change anything in this mod feel free to do so. and use this as a template if you want.

for Proto:

    • BUILDLIMIT: everything that had a buildlimit is now set to a buildlimit of 999 except the monuments for the egypt. I set them to 5. No reason really just cause i wanted to trest something
    • POPULATIONCOUNT: every unit now has its original popcount subtracted by 1. However units that originally were at popcount 1 wouldnt go under it. - Change these settings at your leisure
    • INITIALRESOURCE: Every Resource in this game was multiplied by 3. e.g. a tree would origanlly give you 150Wood, now it holds 450 Wood. that goes for every other resource in this game (mainly Food, Wood and gold)
    • House and Manor: I added two Unique OVERPOWERED techs here researchable by every civ (the 4 starting civs not counting any possible furture ones). more information about thes found below.

for Techtree:

    • added two new techs to all 4 civs

1st Tech (500 Food, 500 Wood and 500 Gold:

    • Villager and fishing ships workrate has been incresed by 200% (faster resource gathering) for Gold, Food and Wood
    • favor rate has been drastically increased for all civs.
      Greece: 900% faster
      Egypt: monuments gather 900% faster
      Norse: Hersir autogatherrate has been increased by 4900%
      Atlantean: Oracle autogatherrate has been increased by 4900%
    • villagers build and repair 200% faster now
    • sets house buildlimit to 999 (redundant, usable in campaign however. wont go over the hardcoded poplimit set in the campaign scenario. for that you'd need to modify the campaign with the Editor built in the game. I can share mine if people seem interested in it)
    • villagers are 30% faster now
    • tradunits are 100% faster now

2nd Tech (2000 Food, 2000 Wood, 2000 Gold)

    • Walls now have 900% more Health
    • Sentry Towers and Fortresses now have 400% more Health
    • Sentry Towers now do 350% more damage
    • Fortresses now do 250% more damage
    • sets Sentry Tower buldlimit to 999 (redundant, same info as house buildlimit)

Customization:

To modify the mod's settings, you can edit the proto_mods.xml and techtree_mods.xml files located in your mod directory: C:\Users\[you]\Games\Age of Mythology Retold\[some numbers]\mods. Use a suitable text editor like Notepad++ or VS Code to make changes.

This adds Spartan Hoplites aswell as their King Leonidas to your game. They are somewhat broken and not meant to be played in a serious online game due to comparatively overwhelming stats.
They can be recruited in the Military Barracks from Greece. The AI will also use these as Greeks so be careful. You can also recruit them in the campaign.
It is a sort of Additive Data mod, however the art files are not modified 100% in an additive way, so there is room for incompability with other mods that change the art.
There is also a possibility that these units will not work if there is another mod that is editing the simdata.simjson or you will not be able to recruit them if you use mods that edit the 3rd and 4th row of the 1st barracks column like the recruitable militia mod.
They use a custom composition of animations that makes them attack cooler than default hoplites by using the hypaspist stab animation. They also have a very long spear from Atalanta which makes them able to attack in 2 columns.

Known Issues / WIP
- Helmets don't fit properly on the Head (This will be fixed once the Model Plugins become viable
- Incompabilities with other mods introducing custom art compositions for custom units (currently no known way to bypass this other than using a shared simdata.simjson across all mods that try to achieve this)
- Leonidas has the UI Indicator to pick-up relics ,however when doing so, he won't actually pick them up. (Will fix when I know how)
- The Body composition is not to my perfect taste, since we all know they wear no breastplate
- The animations are also not considered finished. At the very least I want to create that iconic phalanx-ready animation.

(Additive Mod) 
- Allows you to kind of start the game in the Classical Age, by reducing the costs and researchtime of all previous techs and the AgeUp to ~1 (you still have to build the required buildings to age up). 
- The mod is written in a way that it should work for all major/minor gods, also ones added by other mods/game updates. So no update of the mod needed. 
 
Attention: 
- Only works for new started games, not savegames 
- Only enable ONE of my "Fast Age" mods at once, otherwise the techs wont be cheap/fast 
- As soon as reaching the Classical Age, all tech costs/times are reverted back to default, so make sure to research every tech from previous ages first. (Unfortunately the devs added "auto-research" in a way (researchpoints=0), that makes it impossible to revert the auto-research (divide by 0) after reaching the wanted age, so I can not add this)

(Additive Mod) 
- multiplies the hitpoints of all buildings with 2. (since version 1.01) 
- multiplies the hitpoints and damage from AbstractTownCenter and AbstractFortress with 4 and slightly increases Hack armor. 
- multiplies the hitpoints from AbstractTower and AbstractWall with 3 and slightly increases Hack armor. 
- doubles the buildlimit for AbstractTower and *1.5 the buildlimit from AbstractFortress. 
- slightly increases the Damage from these defensive buildings by 2-3%. 
 
- this mod should work for every other building of these kinds added by game updates or mods, even from new civs. No need to update the mod. 
- it does not hardcode new values, but increases the current ones, so can also be combined with other mods changing these values. 
 
If you want to report bugs, write to User "serp66" in the official "Age of Empires" discord channel.

(Additive Mod) 
- doubles the resource amount from all resource sources (unittype=Resource) 
 
The code is written in a way, that it should also affects all resource sources added by game updates or other mods, so no update should be needed. 
And it does not hardcode a fixed value, it multiplies them, so it can stack if you use other mods modifying it. 
 
Known issues: 
- when loading a savegame where this mod was not yet active in, most resources will show their progress bar forever. But this is no problem for new games. 
 
If you want to report bugs, write to User "serp66" in the official "Age of Empires" discord channel.

modName: Trainable Story Heroes and Units (Over 110 Units) by Nergico
description:
(Additive)

All builders now have an arrow at the bottom of the last row that takes you to a new page. All new buildings can be found there. If you press the arrow again, you return to the old page. This clearly shows which buildings have been newly added by this mod.

In the new buildings, you can train all the heroes from the story campaign and many other Units. More units will follow. Overall, there are already over 110 new units and buildings included in this mod!
All units from the Arena of the Gods story campaign are now included.

I have adjusted the Stats of the Units to make them as balanced as possible, though further tweaks might still be necessary.

All new units and buildings are marked with the name "Nergico" in the editor. In the normal game, they have their original names to avoid confusion.

All modified units and buildings were written into the file as new units and buildings so that the original units and buildings are not altered. This makes the mod compatible with Story Mode and has fewer conflicts with other mods that use the same units or buildings.

This mod is additive, meaning it should continue to work normally after updates and should not conflict with other mods.

I will continue updating the mod over time. My goal is to make many more units trainable that you normally cannot use.
Planned future updates:
- Give units that don't have an attack animation an attack.
- Add new heroes, like those from Age of the Gods or the Chinese.
- Much more.

If you have any suggestions for improvements or found something  feel free to let me know!

This mod is a huge project for me, and I’m working on it passionately and for long hours. If something doesn't work, please don’t rate the mod poorly right away; instead, give me feedback, and I will fix it.

You can always reach me on the official AOM Discord server under @Nergico!

If you would like to support me, I would greatly appreciate a donation for the hard work!
https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=SR3LW4CCUVBPN

modName: Additive Full Tech Tree (Inc Taproot  Dwarven Mine)
description:
Full Tech Tree mod made in additive format, for compatibility with mods and future game updates. 

Includes non infinite but re-buildable Taproot & Dwarven Mine.

Custom Shrines, Major God Statues, Docks & NavalShipyards and Well of Urd as a way to add in other Technologies, Myth Units and non campaign Heroes.

 

Using unique (ish) set buildings separate from the mainline buildings, not touching base game buildings for extra additive compatibility

 

Was having some prior issues with Villagers disappearing from build menus and Ai being unresponsive. Switched to using Technology Unlocks for all via the Major God Statue.

 

Requires getting to Classical Age first for all. Shrine was chosen to keep the technology. Statue was chosen to keep the extra Myth Units.

Temple becomes bloated with Technology and Myth Units, given the small UI build bar which isn't scrollable. May update later to remove the units and technology from the Temple, but may not, as it may mess with the campaign.

If issues with Town Center & Fortress Heroes and Priests selection arise, Primarily Greeks and Egyptians, leave a note so we can fix it.

 

Should work fine with Campaign too, Ai doesn't seems to use the extra technology or units, might be wrong

Should work fine for Skirmish and Multiplayer.

 

Using a custom unique (Ish) Regent to serve as a builder for added custom buildings, for compatibility with other mods.

 

Ai sometimes, particularly Allies, tend to not respond and stop doing anything after a while in maps. 

not sure what the issue might be but could be due to Custom Mod Maps, as they've played fine on regular game maps.

Removes build limits for all Units and Buildings which have a set limit.

For Campaigns, use it alongside the mod ,Campaign: no Pop Limit and House Build Limit Script removed.

 

The Tech included is meant to be used only for the Campaigns, there's little benefit to using it in Skirmish or Multiplayer

Reason being the Limits are already removed, while for the Campaigns, limits are set to 9999.

modName: Infinite Housing, Increased Resources, Triple Upgrades
description:
I created this mod because I found that most increased resource/population mods were causing skirmish matches to crash.  I suspect that this was due to removing build limits on certain units (titan gates, caravans, etc.) that the AI starts using heavily in the last age.  This mod has been tested and works properly during AI skirmish matches.

This mod makes the following changes:
- Housing build limit is removed.
- Housing addition to population capacity is increased
- Triple upgrades for every technology available (Shoutout to the triple tech mod that  this mod piggybacks off of)
- Most resource totals have been increased.  Gold mines should be a high enough value so that they'll never run out.  Trees, animals, and berry bushes have been increased but will eventually run out/be cut down.
- Some unit caps have been removed (workers and fishing ships)


Disclaimers:
- I don't make any promises about keeping this mod up to date.  If the game is updated and this mod no longer works, feel free to make your own.  Do whatever you want with it.  I don't care.
- I have borrowed from other mods, in particular the triple tech mod by Loggy and the increased pop and resource mod posted by VinnayVinny.

modName: 神话时代简体中文重译版 AOM Simplified Chinese Retranslated Version
description:
在官方原有的汉化基础上，结合了过往神话时代民间的翻译版本，拓展版官方繁体中文翻译版本以及大神和个人考究后得出的重新翻译的汉化翻译文本包，在尽可能符合原意的基础之上保留了神话时代简体中文老玩家的部分习惯称呼，对单位、科技和战役文本部分进行了部分重译。但部分翻译用词有个人偏好的成分，加上作者的疏漏，一部分文本会存在漏译、错译、误译、重译和生僻翻译等部分翻译问题，如有问题欢迎各位玩家和大佬指正和斧正。

modName: Traditional Chinese text replacement 繁體中文翻譯修正
description:
本模組旨在修正AOM:Retold的破爛繁體中文翻譯品質。

翻譯內容僅包含單位、建築、部分神力、部分科技(技術)，不包含劇情對話。

1. 更換原有單位、建築名稱

例如：
王朝騎兵vs.王族騎兵
要塞vs. 城堡中心(神力+建築)
斧兵vs. 持斧士兵
山寨vs. 山丘堡壘

2. 部分翻譯修正

遠距士兵→弓兵
第二時代→古典時代 etc.

3. 錯誤翻譯修正

冰霜巨人→山巨人(我不知道這怎麼出錯的)
賀瑟戰士→赫瑟戰士(原版就有的錯)

4. 已知問題
仍有部分神力、升級(技術)等未更改，需要我花時間逐一比對。
且新版本的字串跟舊版本的順序不同

5. 不修正或不更改
全新的技術、升級、神力。
e.g. 狂戰士之怒對應北歐大幅度修正不適合更改

 

有任何問題歡迎寄信至：swattw[at}blog.swat.tw

** NEW UPDATE — 11th February 2026 **
Updated mod for compatibility with Update 18.65484 (coinciding with New Gods Pack: Demeter).

* * * * *

Mythic UI is a collection of refinements and QoL tweaks to the game's UI, aimed specifically for PC players. This version is best used with the 'Alternative HUD' setting enabled, otherwise the panels may not be positioned correctly.

Please feel free to leave feedback, or suggest other tweaks that could be made!  https://forums.ageofempires.com/t/mythic-ui/262468

HUD Changes
- Resources are shown in the bottom-left corner of the screen, with icons and text changed to be left-aligned. The panel graphics have been reworked to make it blend together.
- The population resource indicator now shows a breakdown of Civilian and Military population.
- Certain standard resolution icons have been changed to the correct size, instead of being the same size as the Ultra HD assets (which resulted in distortion).
- Resource panel tooltips can now be viewed by hovering over the icons, in addition to hovering over the text.
- Major God icon in the unit info panel is separated from the player name, and now shows a text label of the god's name (also added special handling for the campaign scenario "A Lost People", so that it does not show an icon of Oranos in the unit info panel).
- Diplomatic relation with other players (Ally, Enemy, Neutral) is now more prominently displayed in the unit information panel.
- Fixed the positioning of the major god watermark/motif in the background of the unit info panel, as it is misaligned in vanilla (once you've noticed it, you can't unnotice it!)
- Unit camera buttons (perspective, follow) are now hidden for immobile units (i.e. buildings, carnivora, etc.) since these functions don't work properly on them. 
- The perspective camera button texture has been edited so that it properly matches the textures of the other buttons.

Game Summary Popup
- Formatting now matches the loading screen summary, to improve readability.
- A few missing game rule settings now show on the Summary screen. 

Replay HUD 
- Playback panel has been shifted right-wards, so that it isn't overlapped by the new resource panel. The playback control buttons have also been made smaller so that they fit properly within the new UI.

Mods Section 
- Font size has been reduced for some elements to improve readability. 

Note that this mod will conflict with any other mod that modifies the same files in UI.bar:
- GameSummaryPopup.xaml
- HUD_AlternativeMouseResources.xaml 
- HUD_MouseResources.xaml
- Lobby_GodPicker.xaml
- Mods_BrowseMods.xaml

Special thanks to:  
Loggy (for paving the way with the Bottom-Left Resources mod)  
CryShana (for creating CryBarEditor tool)  
VladTheJunior & Kevsoft (for creating AOE3 Resource Manager)

I generally intend on releasing 2 versions, possibly 3, of this map. The two guaranteed versions are this base one which has no trigger functionality (though may add for God choice) and the second will feature a Day-Night cycle. 

 

Map Description:

The map is based on Lost Temple from Warcraft 3 with 4 abandoned settlements in the corners of the map that can be captured by the player. Each player (4) will start on high elevation fairly equidistant from a settlement and the healing spring at the center of the map. Control of this healing spring will be key to winning the game as it will allow you to recover without having to retreat to your capital.

Note:

This is the Lost Temple with a day-night cycle. Nothing else is different from the base version except for a consistent cycle through time. Dawn -> Morning -> Noon -> Afternoon -> Evening -> Night -> Dawn...and on.

Additive data mod that rebalances relics to be roughly on par with Classical Age minor god technologies (i.e., approximately 50% to 100% stronger). All relics have had their minimum Favor trickle increased from 0.6 Favor per minute to 1.5 Favor per minute.

Standard Relics

Note: This list only contains the mod's relic effects without a comparison to vanilla. Please see the Age of Empires fandom wiki (or similar) for vanilla relic effects.

  • Adamantite Shingles: -16.5%/-25%/-50% hack armor vulnerability for buildings/town centres, towers, fortresses/walls.
  • Ankh of Ra: +9 Favor per minute.
  • Anvil of Hephaestus: +10% damage and +0.5x damage bonus multiplier vs. myth units for fortress-type human soldiers.
  • Archimedes' Ledger: -1 population cost and -40% train time for siege weapons and ships.
  • Armor Of Achilles: -10% and -15% hack armor vulnerability for upgradeable human infantry and heroes.
  • Arrows of Heracles: +0.75 divine damage over 6 seconds for upgradeable ranged soldiers and heroes (can stack with Shafts of Plague).
  • Arrows of the Alfar: +1.5 divine damage for all building ranged attacks.
  • Black Lotus: +25% Berry Bush gather rate for villagers.
  • Blanket of Empress Zoe: -11.5% crush armor vulnerability for all buildings.
  • Blue Crystal Shard: +10% Gold and Wood gather rates for villagers.
  • Bow of Artemis: 100% accuracy for ranged myth units, human soldiers, and ballistas.
  • Bridle of Pegasus: +1 Pegasus that respawns 30 seconds after dying.
  • Canopic Jar of Imsety: -20% train time and +10% hitpoints for all infantry.
  • Chariot of Cybele: +2 respawning Golden Lions that scale with Age.
  • Charon's Obol: +5 gold on death for human soldiers and heroes.
  • Demeter's Throne: +2/+1 build limit for houses/manors.
  • Dwarven Calipers: +15% attack speed and +7.5% movement speed for siege weapons and ships.
  • Dwarven Horseshoes: +10% movement speed and hitpoints for all cavalry.
  • Eye of Horus: +5 population cap addition for Town Centers.
  • Eye of Ornlu: +15% damage for human counter-infantry units.
  • Fetters of Fenrir: +0.2% damage and attack speed per 1% hitpoints lost for myth units.
  • Gambanteinn Odin's Wand: -50% cost and +100% research rate for Temple technologies.
  • Girdle of Hippolyta: +10% attack speed and +5% movement speed for all archers.
  • Gungnir Odin's Spear: +15% damage for human counter-cavalry units.
  • Harmonia's Necklace: +20% Gold gather rate for villagers.
  • Head of Orpheus: +4 line of sight and +2 range for all buildings.
  • Hekate's Torches: -30% Favor cost and cooldown time for God powers.
  • Hermes' Winged Sandals: +5% movement speed and +10% attack speed for heroes.
  • Hestia's Hearth: +20% work rate for Town Centers.
  • Kithara of Apollo: +10% movement/build speed and +5 Food, Wood, and Gold carry capacity for villagers.
  • Nose of the Sphinx: +20% hitpoints for all buildings.
  • Oseberg Wagon: -50% Food cost and +20% movement speed for caravans.
  • Pandora's Box: -20% Favor cost and -40% train time for myth units.
  • Pelt of Argus: +6 line of sight for all units.
  • Ptah's Sceptre: -50% Wood and Gold cost for Farms and +10% Farm gather rate for villagers.
  • Pygmalion's Statue: +50% hitpoints and +5% gather rate for villagers.
  • Rheia's Crown: +3 Favor per minute for each Town Center.
  • Ring of the Nibelung: +75 Gold per minute.
  • Scales of Echidna: -20% Food, Wood, and Gold cost and -1 population cost for myth units.
  • Scales of Catoblepas: -15% pierce and hack armor vulnerability for myth units.
  • Ship of Fingernails: +60 Food per minute.
  • Sistrum Of Bast: -20% Food, Wood, and Gold cost and +10% Wood gather rate for villagers.
  • Skulls of the Cercopes: +6 respawning Relic Monkeys that scale with Age.
  • Staff of Dionysus: +0.5 hitpoint regeneration per second for all units.
  • Svadilfari's Sledge: +1.5 Favor per minute for each Fortress-type building.
  • Tail of Cerberus: -20% ability cooldown and +10% damage for myth units.
  • Texts of Imhotep: -10% build time, -20% Wood and Gold cost for all buildings.
  • The Khopesh of Horus: +20% damage vs myth units for heroes.
  • The Scarab Pendant: +15% crush damage for myth units and siege weapons.
  • The Titan's Treasure: -20% cost and -40% time for Age upgrades and Secrets of the Titans.
  • Thundercloud Shawl: -10% and -15% pierce armor vulnerability for human soldiers and upgradeable  heroes.
  • Tower of Sestus: +1x damage bonus multiplier vs. myth units for all buildings.
  • Trojan Gate Hinge: +100% hitpoints for walls.
  • Tusk of the Iron Boar: +10% damage and +0.5x damage bonus multiplier vs. archers for all cavalry.
  • Tyrfing, Angantyr's Sword: +15% lifesteal for heroes.
  • Ullr's Bow: +2 range and line of sight for ballistas and all archers.

Immortal Pillars Relics

  • Feather of Bifang: +0.4x damage bonus multiplier vs. buildings for human soldiers.
  • Feather of Jingwei: +90 Wood per minute.
  • Five Colored Stone of Nuwa: -50% repair cost and +100% repair speed.
  • Fur of Boyi: +1 hitpoint regeneration per second for heroes.
  • Jade Hare: +5% movement speed and +10% attack speed for myth units.
  • Kui Drum: +0.2% damage and attack speed per 1% hitpoints lost for heroes.
  • Nine Cauldrons: -10% pierce and hack armor vulnerability for fortress-type human soldiers.
  • Shennong's Ochre Whip: +5% extra Farm gather rate for Plow, Irrigation, and Flood Control technologies.
  • Tusk of Dangkang: +25% fattening rate for herdables and +10% gather rate from herdables for villagers.
  • Wuhao, Bow of Huangdi: +20% slow on hit effect for all archers.
  • Xirang: +2.5 hitpoint regeneration per second for all buildings.

Heavenly Spear Relics

  • Tail Feathers of Heaven: +0.75 divine damage over 3 seconds for infantry.
  • Little Crow Circle: +2.5% extra damage from each Armory weapon upgrade.
  • Heavenly Jeweled Spear: +0.5 melee attack range for counter-cavalry units.
  • Ōkuninushi's Covenant: +20% passive Favor generation rate.
  • Hoori's Hunting Bow: +20% huntable gather rate and 2x damage bonus vs huntables for villagers.
  • Nine-Tailed Fox Charm: +1 hitpoint regeneration per second for myth units.
  • Grass-Cutting Sword: +5% movement speed and +10% attack speed for infantry.
  • Tawara Toda's Last Arrow: +0.5 divine damage for archers.
  • Ogre-Bitten Helm: +15% hitpoints for heroes.
  • Dragon Palace Crystal: +25% hitpoints for walls, towers and Fortress-type buildings.

modName: RE:Told Unleashed! CO-OP and Campaign Tuning Mod
description:
A tuning mod focused on amplifying what is unique and awesome for each civilization and pantheon. Changes made to each unit, civ mechanic and unique technology to make them more distinct while still within a rough balance framework. Great for Skirmish, CO-OP and Campaign playthroughs.

 

does feature slight ai modification to more reliably build houses, research unique techs and choose certain age ups that support their playstyle. house fix has a big impact on its performance.

 

feel free to give any feedback.

modName: Settlers: El olor de la magia
description:
Mapa 6 players donde eres un colono descubriendo un nuevo mundo.

Sube a tu barco que navega a toda velocidad. Ahora debes explorar y encontrar el lugar que mejor se adapte a ti para construir tu asentamiento y levantar una poderosa civilizacion para vencer al resto de jugadores que comenzáron en las mismas condiciones de colono que tu.

Este mapa es abundante en recursos. Las minas de oro son infinitas, incluso se dice que nadie conseguirá jamás talar todos sus bosques. 

Casi la totalidad se puede recorrer con unidades terrestres, porque las regiones estan muy bien conectadas y disponen de defensas naturales como acantilados o montañas que harán un poco mas difícil la invasión enemiga. El mar va a desempeñar un papel muy importante ya que además del alimento, también sirve para acceder a cualquier zona y poder atacar desde las costas. Quien controle el mar tendra ventaja.
It's Niles, but they're connected.
Four players fight over a tropical island with a volcano at the center.

Norse raiders have been attacking a harbour under Hades' protection, but something about these raiders is not what it seems...

Fight back against the might of Muspelheim and know that when you swing at the king, you better not miss.

Intended as a fun casual experience. 
Game Time: 10-20 minutes.

modName: Cuca UI Ultrawide - Transparency and Panel Priority
description:
Mod compatible with quick online and ranked matches released after update 17.30764. 
 
Description: 
 
In addition to the transparent panels for better viewing of the battlefield, in this Game Interface, the more important the information, the closer to the center of the screen and the more united they will be, being in the center of your vision, so that you see subconsciously, with less effort and fewer mouse movements, with this you gain greater objectivity and agility especially if you use an Ultrawide monitor. 
 
1. Resources in the Center of the Screen - One of the most important pieces of information in the game so that you have an accurate macro. 
 
2. Active Godpowers in the center of the screen - Notice godpowers immediately when activated. 
 
3. Larger minimap and closer to the center - Better notice raids and other opponent movements with the enlarged minimap. 
 
4. Universal production queue, production queue of the selected building and production panel united, within the field of vision and in one place, greater agility. Also, the universal production queue has the most separate technologies from the units. 
 
5. Chat notifications and messages on the right side near the center of the screen. 
 
6. Player scores in the right corner in the middle of the screen height. 
 
There are two versions of this mod, FHD(in development) and UWQHD (Ultrawide), make sure you downloaded the correct one. 
 
Before installing, make sure that: 
 
1. Open the game and unzoom the minimap if it is active. 
 
2. The option "Enable Alternate HUD Layout" is activated in "Settings / User Interface". 
 
3. Also in "Settings / User Interface / HUD Resize" adjust the zoom to 85% so that no item overlaps another. 
 
4. It may not be compatible with all resolutions.

modName: Modder Map: All Units and Objects in AoM:R!
description:
This map shows everything available in the map editor (all units, buildings, objects, etc.)! This is meant to be a 'visual toolbox' that can be helpful whether you play it as a custom skirmish or open it in the editor. There are many signposts and tools to help you review options.

You can easily test over 30 million combinations of shading effects on everything! You can also copy / place new units for any player and the shading effects will apply to them automatically. I've included 100 examples of cool shading combinations that you can easily test.

There's also a custom font (with emojis!) made of white bricks that you can copy to label parts of your own maps!

Look around and get inspired!

Note: If you want to open this map in the editor, see the ReadMe.txt file included in the mod's install folder.

description:
> A lot of improvements to the User Interface, see screenshot.

> If you want to see your resources **bottom right** next to the minimap -- in this mod with an improved coloring! -- you have to activate ''Enable Alternative HUD Layout'' (Settings: UI).

modName: MythicIV UI - An AoE4 UI layout based off MythicUI.
description:
This mod is a alternative version of MythicUI by DorsalAxe/Lousy Username. It includes the main changes from Mythic UI (QoL and bottom left corner resources panel with population information, and more) but also includes tweaks that move the idle banners and global queue above the resources area of the screen to mimick AoEIV interface and user experience.

With this mod, all relevant information regarding game macro can be found condensed in one corner of the screen, making it easier to notice and track.

This mod is Ranked friendly. This mod is PC/Keyboard and Mouse only. Be sure to have "Alternative HUD" turned on in settings. Some UI elements might overlap if UI zoom settings are different than 100% (the default).

I just altered a game file to move idle banners and global queue to the bottom, the rest of the mod and its credits go to Dorsal Axe, creator of the original Mythic UI mod.

New Update: I had to remove most of Mythic UI QoL improvements because they broke game creation.

If you are the creator of Mythic UI, i tried contacting you in discord so you could upload this, if you want me to take it down so you can publish it yourself, i can do so :)

Converts the Atlantean Murmillo to a Roman Legionary who has increased stats and is able to build. The base model used was that of the Greek Myrmidon together with the Atlantean Sword, Destroyer Shield and Katapeltast helmet and armor to form a late Empire looking Roman soldier. The building animations are a little bit janky so I will need to figure them out, other than that I also planned on having them be able to throw pila so they're even more historically accurate as a charged ranged attack but so far it hasn't been working properly. I also plan on adding custom sounds so they speak Latin rather than Atlantean, thank you for trying out the mod and I'm open to suggestions, feedback as well as any help with what I'm trying to do. Cheers.

Hey everyone! I wanted to share a custom WSAD keybind setup I created for camera movement. It took me forever to get started since I had to map everything out first, but I finally got it working!

Basically, I shifted most of the default keys to the right as needed to fit the WSAD layout, while making a few personal tweaks along the way (nothing too crazy except for swapping auto/multi "alt/CTRL"). If you're looking for a good starting point, I'd highly recommend trying this out. I've spent over 6 hours refining this (with a spreadsheet to keep track of everything), and though it’s still a work in progress, it is already pretty solid.

My end goal is to have everything neatly aligned so that each row and column corresponds to the same key layout for consistency. Make sure to make a backup of your keybinds and put this is @USER\Games\Age of Mythology Retold\NUMBERS\users . Let me know if you try it out or have any suggestions!

ps. not all keys are unbinded from WSAD, specificially holding shift/ctrl/alt may limit movement.

modName: Instant MatchGod Restart - For Training Starts
description:
I have put together a resettable starting map primarily with the ability to switch gods or replay multiple time as the same god for training purpose. The map itself was created off a standard generation of Black Sea. You can use it to practice specific builds or experiment with different civilizations, but feel free to play it however you like. This mod is currently in an early beta stage, with only light testing so far, so I appreciate your patience as I make improvements based on suggestions and feedback. "Starting Trainer - Reset any God" is the name of the map.

The reset function is triggered when you select one of the units standing in front of a named flag. Currently the main issues with reset is technologies, as I have not found a proper way to reset them without taking hours of my time. After selecting, please wait for the camera to pan back to the Town Center before starting. There is a timer that will display the reset process and a timer to show you how many seconds it has been since reset incase you want to time yourself.

Trees despawn and respawn during resets, though I have only worked on the forests near the starting Town Center, the second TC, and one near the water. After each reset, your starting population will spawn in front of the TC,  this is as close as I can get to a real starting scenario for now, but future updates will refine this. Otherwise all gold and food also respawns.

Please avoid killing Player 2 villagers in the opposite corner of the map, they are blocked off for a reason. I may also add environmental changes and random resource generation in upcoming updates.

This mod is only compatible with Single Player and can be launched through Skirmish - Custom Scenario. Let me know what you think, and feel free to reach out on Discord SlySanity with any suggestions. Enjoy!

modName: Cuca UI FHD - Transparency and Panel Priority
description:
EXTREMELY IMPORTANT - ADJUSTMENTS REQUIRED FOR THE MOD TO WORK: 
 
1. OPEN THE GAME AND UNZOOM THE MINIMAP IF IT IS ACTIVATED (OTHERWISE YOUR MINIMAP WILL NOT APPEAR). 
 
2. Also in "Settings / User Interface / HUD Resizing" adjust the zoom to 85% (so that no item overlaps another). 
 
3. Best for 1920x1080, may not be compatible with all resolutions. Mod compatible with quick online and ranked matches released after update 17.30764. 
 
Description: 
 
Transparent panels for better viewing of the battlefield. 
 
1. Global production queue and resources in the center of the screen - One of the most important information in the game. 
 
2. Active divine powers in the center of the screen - Observe divine powers immediately when activated. 
 
3. Larger minimap closer to the center - See your opponent's attacks and other movements better with the enlarged minimap. 
 
4. Universal production queue, production queue of the selected building and production panel all in one place, within the field of view, for greater agility. 
 
5. Player scores in the middle right corner of the screen. 
 
There are two versions of this mod, FHD and UWQHD, make sure you have downloaded the correct one.

2-player coop adaptation of the singleplayer campaigns.

All singleplayer campaigns, including cutscenes, are available:

  • Fall of the Trident
  • The New Atlantis
  • The Golden Gift
  • Mythical Battles
  • Pillars of the Gods

Key features:

  • All difficulties are available, including Extreme and Legendary
  • All triggers and objectives updated to support two players
  • Implemented fixes for several common desyncs

To play, simply host a scenario, select a difficulty, and invite your friend.

End of level cutscenes are located in the cinematics folder for each campaign.

If you are using any original voice mods, ensure both players are using the same mods to avoid desyncs during cutscenes.

If you encounter any issues, feel free to let me know in the forums.

These scenarios are designed with a focus on co-op play against stronger AIs, while still maintaining a structure similar to the standard generated maps. The goal of these maps is to help newcomers test strategies that they can later apply in ranked matches. 
Each map in this mod allows players to choose any civilization and color, regardless of the options provided by the map's default setup. 
 
I will update the package with any new type of map I create, maintaining the same core focus. I’m also considering developing some ‘Missions’ for co-op play, which will be in a different mod to avoid confusion with the multiplayer setup. 
 
Most of the maps you will find range from basic modifications to total reworks of randomly generated maps. They include minimal triggers to preserve the randomness of player positions, while also enhancing AI performance over time in different ways. 
Each map may have multiple variants, with varying difficulty levels to cater to stronger players as well. Difficulty can differ significantly between scenarios: some are more intense and require micro-management and counter-strategies, while others should be easy for expert players. 
 
Starting resources are usually set to the standard amount, and nothing extra is provided to players. This is to maintain a clear, standard setup for practice. 
 
Naming Rules: 
 
vs- : Indicates the number of players the co-op is designed for. If you exceed the recommended number of players, feel free to reach out with specific requests. I’m planning to support up to 4v. 
-ex: Means the map includes additional features to improve AI performance in the late game (scaling difficulty). 
-pvp-tn: Indicates the same base map, but with AI benefits removed (allowing a better PvP setup, where players switch positions as teams; -tn specifies the number of teams). 
 
Example Name: 3v4ai-scenario-ex: This means a non-PvP scenario for 3 human players, with AI scaling difficulty in later game stages. 
 
Any suggestions, feedback, or bug reports are welcome! 
Feel free to contact me on AoM or via Discord: hecateprojects

This is a retold rendtion of the classic Settlers map, mixed with the classic RivCiv map of old. This map is designed with competative play in mind. Closer settlements are crammped, have less gold, but have good access to fish, winning water early allows you to control the map. Far settlements have more gold, good fish options, are safer and defenseable, but with less space than the middle settlements.

There might be some calculation mistakes here and there since I used ChatGPT but I tried my best to minimize them as much as possible.

Some of those characters had already special abilities, which they keep also in their Titan form. In such case I have tweaked them on another side. At the end it shall be a quite even battle between a new titan vs a standard one and it shall be possible to successfully fight a titan with only standard units. It isn’t perfectly balanced yet and won’t be, as there are too many differences in their tactics, but I am still working on the mod for some improvements and maybe new features. Have a computer in the last slot. Gods and teams do not matter.  
  
Game Information:  
Survive by lasting 25 minutes against the enemy hordes. You will gain some special god powers during your game allowing you to build temporary cliff walls, walk over cliff, upgrade your towers and even turn all your towers into birds. Among the labyrinth lie relics with divine powers. These can shield you from enemy god powers and even grant you unique buildings such as the death ray tower.  
Enemy units will grow increasingly powerful with time.   
  
Can your team survive?

This (ranked compatible) mod aims to replace the majority of the tooltips in the game with more informative text where possible. While Retold's stock tooltips are a LOT better at describing what things do than the original games were, its tooltips still leave a little to be desired in places, especially around God Powers.

This is intended for people who are already fairly famliar with the game. The amount of detail in this mod's tooltips is intentionally on the excessive side and I expect it to be a little overwhelming for people who are still learning the basics of what all the units/techs do.

Limitations

Unfortunately, simply suppressing the game's default advanced tooltips for techs is not an option, which means you have two choices:

  1. Play with the stock "full tooltips" off (Settings -> UI -> Full Tooltip Help), which has the side effect of hiding the costs of units/techs on the Tech Tree view.
  2. Play with the stock "full tooltips" on, which has the side effect of displaying the vanilla tooltips for tech effects underneath to this mod's ones. I darkened the text of these to make the double tooltips a little less confusing, but it's not ideal.

Additionally, all tooltip values are base values. If you get upgrades, the damage or effective HP of units will not change. 

The majority of this is generated via script, because maintaining the entire thing manually and keeping pace with balance updates did not sound like a very fun experience. This means that some of the language is not very natural in places, but I've tried to a bit to not be quite as verbose as the vanilla tooltips in a few places.

Mythic Roulette is a complex randomization mod that applies randomization on what minor gods that players can worship. Additional options can be selected in-game to provide a more unique game experience.

This mod also includes a significant game design and balance overhaul to fix the variety of civilization-specific tech and god powers. This means many effects are generalized, so it can be used for every god combination.

Contents:

Custom Campaigns:
     - Fall of the Trident (Mythic Roulette)
     - The New Atlantis (Mythic Roulette)
     - The Golden Gift (Mythic Roulette)
     - The Pillars of the Gods (Mythic Roulette)
     - The Heavenly Spear (Mythic Roulette)

All Skirmishes (Random Maps) with one Everchanging Game Mode:
     - Mythic Roulette: a minor god reshuffling experience that will present to you randomized minor gods. Kronos with Ares? Hades with Einheri? There is a vast amount of options at play, every game will reshuffle the players and keep it interesting.
Additional Random Maps options can be selected by the user during the game start menu:
     - Pandora's Realm - unlocks a wealth of unique technologies that can be researched to do things such as make unlock hero myth units, make Kappa trainable, produce respawning Tanuki, or get Kunoichi upon soldier deaths.
     - Campaign Heroes - hero deaths will grant a transformable shade for each Age, which can be done to obtain campaign heroes, some of which have new abilities.
     - Primordial Myth Units - unlocks the ability to transform myth units into a more powerful version of itself, which can have unique abilities or have a different take on its gameplay interactions.
     - God power Delay - for those that want some breathing room or a more competitive experience, god powers that are granted will be briefly delayed.
     - World Twists can be selected, which promise to change the gameplay dynamic, such as recurrently Age advancing each player on a timer to the next Age.

IMPORTANT NOTE:
- Some Random Maps (Skirmish) may operate weirdly with World Twist 4 (World Twist Objectives). I will investigate optimization and bug fixes when I have time.
- Due to the complexity of the resources of this mod, it can only be played and discovered in lobbies by other players that also have it enabled. I recommend to use community forums or Discord servers to find players until mod discovery improves.
- Arena of the Gods Gauntlet mode is a little flawed with detecting non-conventional minor gods at times, lower the frequency of the special modes to reduce the chances of AI problems.
- This mod now overrides the RM_Core.xs file due to necessity, so other maps that interact with this must be disabled or put down in the priority list.
- View the ingame tech tree to see the changes.
- Disable this mod when you are not using the associated maps, as this uses the same core game data.
- The "Restart" button ingame may not keep the previous rolled items. You have to fully quit then start the mission again to reroll the items.

Future Updates List:
- Completing the AI Randomization functionality for campaigns.
- More Blessings, Trials, and Boons.
- Varying balance changes based on various feedback.

Contact:
Feel free to contact me on Discord (as "jslusher"), if you encounter any issues. I also frequent the official Age of Mythology Retold server in the Age of Mythology section (as "Slush").

I hope you enjoy!

Introduction:
Welcome to the Middle-earth as depicted by Tolkien. This map adopts a more comprehensive version than typical Middle-earth maps, striving to faithfully recreate the landscape of Middle-earth. You can reach the vast ice plains of the Northern Waste in the far north, and also touch upon the jungles and grasslands of the far Harad region, as well as a corner of the Dark Forest, the habitat of monkeys. Of course, those critically important and familiar buildings, locations, and units from The Lord of the Rings are all included.

Factions:
The timeline of this map is set during the War of the Ring, featuring 12 factions from Middle-earth.
The forces of good include Gondor, Rohan, Rivendell, Lothlórien, the Woodland Realm, and the Dwarves.
The forces of evil are Mordor, Gundabad, Isengard, Harad, Umbar, and Rhûn.
Players will play as Gondor, tasked with defending Minas Tirith and launching counterattacks to eliminate all evil forces.

How to play:
After subscribing to this mod, You can directly access the map via CUSTOM CAMPAIGN to start playing.
Or open the mod directory and copy the The one ring.mythscn map file to C:\Users\YouName\Games\Age of Mythology Retold\73559436*********\scenario folder, so you can select this map in the game room.
You can play solo through Custom Campaign and Skirmish mode, and if you want to create a room to invite friends to play together, you can subscribe to Nottud's "Allow Dummy AI Players" mod https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/309336/.
This allows you to bypass the official game's unreasonable limitations, enabling you to invite any number of friends. Your friends can control the factions they want to play, while the remaining factions will be filled by AI.

-----------------------------------------------------
The work of Callistonian on Third Age Middle Earth in the Age of Mythology: Extended Edition Workshop has been a significant inspiration to me. Without standing on the shoulders of this predecessor, I could not have created this map.
-----------------------------------------------------

Disabling and Modifications:
The map has disabled Wonders and Titans, and Titans should also be turned off in the room options, as the room options take precedence over the options within the map.
Flying units have been disabled for all factions.
The use of the Fimbulwinter god power is also limited to once, as its destructive power is too great for a map filled with town centers everywhere.
Only specific units have received stat adjustments (this excludes all normally trainable units).

简介：
欢迎来到托尔金笔下的中土世界，这张地图采用了比一般中洲地图更全面的版本，力求还原中洲的样貌，你可以到达极北的辽阔冰原——北荒地，也可以触及到远哈拉德地区的丛林与草原，以及猿猴的栖息地——黑暗森林的一角。当然，魔戒中那些极为重要且耳熟能详的建筑，地点与单位也尽在其中。

势力：
这张地图的时间线为魔戒大战时期，选取了中洲里的12股势力。
正义方为刚铎、洛汗、瑞文戴尔、洛丝罗瑞恩，林地王国和矮人。
邪恶方为魔多、贡达巴德、艾森加德、哈拉德，乌姆巴尔和卢恩。
玩家将扮演刚铎，守护米纳斯提力斯并发起反击，消灭所有的邪恶势力。

如何游玩：
订阅此模组后，你可以通过定制战役直接选择地图游玩。
或打开模组目录，把The one ring.mythscn地图文件复制到C:\Users\YouName\Games\Age of Mythology Retold\73559436*********\scenari场景文件夹中，这样就可以在房间里选择到此图。
你可以通过定制战役和小规模战斗独自游玩，如果你想建立房间邀请好友一同游玩，你可以订阅nottud的Allow dummy AI players模组 https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/309336/。
这样就可以突破官方极不合理的设定，邀请任意数量的好友，让好友操作他们想扮演的阵营，而其余阵营由AI填充。

-----------------------------------------------------
神话时代扩展版创意工坊中Third Age Middle Earth的作者Callistonian的作品给了我相当大的启发，没有这位前辈的肩膀我不可能做成此图。
-----------------------------------------------------

禁用与修改：
地图禁用了奇观和泰坦，在房间选项里也要把泰坦关闭，因为房间选项优先于地图内选项。
所有阵营的飞空单位都无法生产了。

仅对个别单位做了数值修改（不包含任何可正常训练的单位）。

This is 2 team autobattler loosely based on a popular custom game mode "Direct Strike" in other RTS games. If there are more than 2 teams then the other players are assigned to the sides randomly. The map itself supports all player counts but only works with human players. 
 
Train units and position them onto a template in your base to have them periodically spawn in the arena. The units will fight automatically across the arena to the other side. The aim is to destroy the passage in the opponent's base to win. If you get half way across the map then you will receive bonus gold to reward your efforts. 
 
As well as training units you can also age up to unlock new units and purchase generic, specialised, and economic upgrades to help your units and gold income. 
 
Have you got the tactics and teamwork to defeat your opponents? There's only one way to find out!

Battle of Mythic Heroes is a mod for Age of Mythology Retold that incorporates strategic and action-packed elements, drawing inspiration from the MOBA genre. Set in an epic world where gods, heroes, and mythical creatures clash, players must showcase skill, intelligence, and resource management to emerge victorious. The map is divided into three primary lanes, leading to the opponent’s stronghold, which serves as the heart of each player's base and the ultimate target for achieving victory.

 

Features and Gameplay Mechanics:
Initial God Selection: Each god grants unique abilities. Each hero has distinct skills and powers, depending on the god chosen.

Economy and Base Management:

Unlike traditional MOBA modes, Battle of Mythic Heroes retains the core elements of economic development and base building found in Age of Mythology. Players continue to gather resources and manage workers, who are essential for advancing through the ages and upgrading structures. Strategic resource management directly influences the strength of each player's army and hero on the battlefield.

Favor as a Combat Resource:

Divine "favor" is earned exclusively through combat. Defeating enemy warriors or mythical creatures grants favor, rewarding an aggressive playstyle and providing players with additional abilities or benefits.

Creepers and Upgrades:

Scattered across the map, creepers are powerful mythical creatures guarding valuable rewards. Upon defeating them, players gain significant bonuses—boosts in health, speed, armor, and other essential upgrades. These confrontations are risky but can shift the tide of battle.

Relics and Teleportation Strategies:Powerful relics are hidden across the map, granting unique abilities like teleportation (Vortex). Near each base lies a rapid healing spring, adding an extra strategic layer: players can retreat to heal quickly and return to the battlefield via teleportation (Vortex), creating surprise tactics and altering the pace of combat.

Paths to Victory:

In addition to creepers, there are two bosses, the King of Fire and the King of Ice, who grant special powers that can shift the dynamics of the game, potentially sealing victory or defeat.

Unique Elements and StrategyBattle of Mythic Heroes offers a hybrid experience where base management and RPG hero elements blend in a unique way. Every decision—from hero selection to creeper battles and economic strategy—affects the game's outcome. Players may choose an aggressive approach, focusing on eliminating opponents to gain favor, or adopt a more strategic stance, gathering and enhancing resources for a powerful late-game advantage.

This mod delivers intense battles where mythology and strategy intertwine, creating an epic experience that challenges both combat skills and strategic intelligence. In Battle of Mythic Heroes, players not only command armies but also shape the destiny of mythical heroes in a divine war for supremacy!
