Enjoy this vanilla+ mod that adds 32 new random maps to your game that utilizes different terrain or gameplay twists without deviating from vanilla feel of the game too much.

Includes 32 maps:

  1. Alri Sud, an iceberg map.
  2. Bogden, a bog filled with water but is a land map.
  3. Cattle Lands, my first map.
  4. Cypress Scent, a black map filled with cypress trees and strange berries.
  5. Fer Eter, a haunted forest with favor shrines.
  6. Mad Theocrat, a nightmare map that shows a sunken and destroyed Atlantis.
  7. Mount Awot, a black map with golden trees.
  8. Otrera Shore, a beach forest maze.
  9. Outlaw Wastes, a wasteland map.
  10. Qasr El Amanra, a true desert map with power stopping monuments.
  11. Sunlight Strands, yellow fields map with peach blossoms.
  12. Timona's Nest, a dirt map with autumn trees and outposts.
  13. Ubanopolis, an urban map with danger.
  14. White Point, land of goats and snowmen.
  15. Yushania Heights, a unique forest generation map with danger.
  16. Emerald Lush, a map where the trees only grow in ponds.
  17. January Fields, a field where both bandits and rivers run through the land.
  18. Volcanic Disruption, a scorched civilization with lava.
  19. Awot Unknown, a map that changes between many looks.
  20. Luminous Ravine, a map with a ravine in the middle.
  21. Pillar of Atlas, a tropical map with a pillar in the middle.
  22. Round The Spire, an autumn beach map revolving around a spire. 
  23. Haven Exploration, a map where you start close to enemies and venture into a different biome.
  24. Dimlit, a boring monotone map void of colors.
  25. Zero Enclosure, a map where you trapped with your opponent and have to break free.
  26. Katsu Monsoon, a map filled with giant ponds.
  27. Xiluan, a map with only one forest and a giant mountain range.
  28. Into The Spire, a map that changes its grassy terrain often.
  29. Numinous Arena, an unusual map where you start with your first settlement and fight in a pit.
  30. Fossa Per Terram, a map where resources are separated to different locations
  31. Guerra Alta, a map with an extra town center that is difficult to defend.
  32. Awot Nomad, the long-requested Nomad variant that has several biomes.

I have worked on this for a really long time with 300+ hours exclusively in alpha testing with various game modes to see if they are functional, but please forgive me if they break at any point and report it on the Age of Empires forums! This is my first time coding.

I understand this may not be the most impressive mod, but this was mostly made for me and my friends. I do hope that other people will get some enjoyment from this though.

The maps all use vanilla assets outside of their map selection and loading screen pictures, so they should work with friends who do not have the mod.

The current version of this mod is developed for V.100.18.65484.0 (589772R) of Age of Mythology. While I hope it holds up in the future, there is a chance it does not.

modName: Arena of the Gods (AOTG) - Researchable Blessings for Multiplayer
description:
Arena of the Gods (AOTG): Researchable Blessings for Multiplayer

This mod brings the Arena of the Gods experience to multiplayer matches – featuring divine blessings, optional bonus resources, and a new way to play using Kastor as your research hub.

Note:

World Twists are not included in this mod. For these effects, check out the separate mod: Arena of the Gods (AOTG) – Random World Twists.

How It Works:

  1. A technology called Start Effects is available at the Town Center.
  2. Researching Start Effects spawns Kastor and his bodyguards.
  3. Kastor acts as your Blessing Research Hub, allowing you to unlock powerful divine effects that enhance your army, economy, and strategy.
  4. You can unlock up to three blessings per match.
  5. After researching Start Effects, you can optionally research a second technology to receive a starting resource bonus. 

Available Blessings:

  • Freyr’s Chosen Few: Houses/Manors cost more but spawn a villager when built.
  • Gaia’s Lashing Roots: Heroes and Legends deal area-of-effect damage.
  • Gaia’s Last Resort: Spawns temporary dryads that defend your base.
  • Hel’s Last Promise: Dying myth units explode, damaging nearby enemies.
  • Isis’ Divine Retinue: Myth units cost less favor.
  • Kastor’s Elite Guard: Start with a larger bodyguard squad.
  • Kronos’ Drowsy Dance: Slows down enemy units near your Legend.
  • Loki’s Serpentine Wrath: A free Nidhogg spawns at your Temple when you reach the Mythic Age.
  • Odin’s Outlaw Wisdom: Special abilities and god powers recharge faster.
  • Oranos’ Primordial Power: God powers are cheaper to recast.
  • Poseidon’s Rushing Tides: Legends and Heroes move faster.
  • Ptah’s Secret Tools: Villagers gather resources faster.
  • Ra’s Nourishing Sun: Villagers are cheaper.
  • Set’s Boundless Greed: Human soldiers regenerate health when attacking.
  • Thor’s Crashing Thunder: Human soldiers deal bonus damage.
  • Zeus’ Martial Drills: Human soldiers train faster.
  • Sobek's Healing Waters: Units near Temples regain health.
  • Thor's Little Helpers: Dwarves spawn whenever you advance to the next Age.
  • Hephaestus' Wheel Grease: Siege units move faster.
  • Hermes' Swift Stallions: Cavalry moves faster.
  • Bast's Crescent Fertility: Town Centers cost less and are built faster.
  • Ullr's Progression Feast: Players get Favor on advancing Age.
  • Set's Sacrificial Food: Earn Food when your Villagers die.
  • Odin's Swarm Tactics: Barracks, Longhouse, Military Academy, Military Barracks, and Military Camp work much faster.
  • Apollo's Rapid Fire: Ranged units shoot faster.
  • Athena's Minotaur Muscle: Gain Minotaurs on every age up.
  • Horus' Falcon Sentinels: Town Centers gain massive line of sight.
  • Osiris' Chunky Beasts: Herdables fatten faster and can fatten to a higher limit.
  • Hera's Righteous Wrath: Infantry deals a small area of damage.
  • Vidar's Fearsome Villagers: Villagers slow down enemy human units nearby.
  • Ra's Gold Goods: Trade units generate more gold.
  • Loki's Skillful Scions: Melee cavalry inflict area damage.
  • Hades' Watchful Wiles: Myth Units have more hitpoints.
  • Kronos’ Time Savings: Buildings are constructed faster.
  • Crimson Myth Units: Myth Units regenerate hitpoints when they attack enemy units.

Recommended Use:

Perfect for 1v1, team matches, or free-for-all games where you want to spice up your strategy with divine bonuses.

Campaign Compatibility:

This mod is intended for multiplayer and custom games. When used in campaign missions, unexpected behavior may occur. For example, in certain scenarios (e.g., Mission 4), the game may automatically apply AOTG technologies even though Kastor does not appear. This can lead to:

  • Unusual villager spawns from buildings like the Mansion, including units from multiple civilizations (such as Egyptian, Norse, or Chinese), which may cause control or gameplay inconsistencies.
  • AI opponents unintentionally benefiting from all AOTG effects, which can significantly increase the challenge, especially in missions with strong pre-deployed enemy forces.
  • The game may crash!

For the best experience, it’s recommended to disable this mod during campaign play.

Feedback & Contact

I’m always open to suggestions, improvements, or feedback of any kind!

Feel free to reach out to me at jayo7.aom@gmail.com

Thanks for checking out the mod – and have fun experimenting with the blessings!

A remake of mission 1 from the 'Tale of the Dragon' campaign in Age of Mythology: Extended Edition!


All the map and objectives are back in Retold version. Some mechanics have been adapted and all bugs and strange problems have been fixed.


To recapture the spirit of the original campaign, many elements have been modified to match the old version of the Chinese pantheon :

- The garden is back! Only one can be built, but it's just as effective as 8 gardens in the old version. However, it is fragile and very expensive!
- The military buildings have been remixed. The War Academy trains foot soldiers (Ranged and Melee) and the Stable trains cavalry.
- Light cavalry units (Qing Rider and Bow Cavalry) are trainable and fully functional with their respective upgrades.
- Several units have been renamed. Yan Feifeng becomes Jiao Long, Houyi becomes Shun, the Terracotta Riders become Terracotta Warriors, Jiang Ziya becomes a General, etc... (Most of the new Retold names have been retained because they are simply better than the old ones. Like 'Ge Halberdier', etc...)


The Objectives have been slightly redesigned to appear clearer to the player.

 

Other information : 
- Intro cutscene can be skipped without impacting the correct operation of triggers.
- By typing the command 'YES MY EMPEROR' in the chat, you can play with the original icons of Jiao Long and Shun!


That's all! Have fun! :D

 

Change Lists :

- Fixed a minor problem that prevented the first intro music from playing.

05/21/2025

- Updated the hack damage stats of enemy Terracotta Riders and Qiongqis to restore mission difficulty to what it was before the last game patch.

05/24/2025

- Changed the stable icon to an unused icon in the game of a Chinese building with the role of a stable.
- Changed the garden icon to differentiate it more easily from the Imperial Academy, which is not present in this mod.
- Adding decoration
- Addition of the “Medium Archer” technology in the stable, to avoid confusion regarding the Bow Cavalry unit.

06/19/2025

- The Chinese civilisation's theme that play in the intro now pauses with the game to not create a mismatch with the basic music that comes later.
- Update of forbidden technologies.
- More meteorological effects added as events progress.

modName: Arena of the Gods (AOTG) - Random World Twists for Multiplayer
description:
Arena of the Gods (AOTG) – Random World Twists

This mod brings chaotic, scenario-wide divine events into your multiplayer games. Each match is affected by a random World Twist that changes the rules for all players – along with dynamic seasonal weather effects that shift over time. Unlike Blessings (which only affect human players individually), World Twists are global effects that apply equally to everyone and reshape the flow of the match.

Note:

Researchable Blessings are not included in this mod. For individual player bonuses like divine enhancements and unique effects, check out the separate mod: Arena of the Gods (AOTG): Researchable Blessings for Multiplayer

How It Works:

  • Supports almost all standard (vanilla) maps.
  • When the game starts, one random World Twist is selected and applied.
  • Additionally, a random version of Freyr’s or Loki’s Harsh Weather system is activated, introducing evolving seasonal effects.
  • These mechanics create highly replayable and unpredictable matches that demand flexible strategies. 

Available World Twists (One is chosen at random):

  • Thoth’s Divine Wisdom: All god technologies have double their usual effect – amplifying both strengths and weaknesses.
  • Freyja’s Second Ride: Falling cavalry spawn infantry reinforcements, but cavalry become more expensive to train.
  • Prometheus’ Secret Knowledge: Grants early access to a titan gate that builds itself over time. Villagers become far less effective.
  • Athena’s Vanguard Heroism: Heroes cost no favor. Upon death, they inspire nearby allies with doubled attack for 10 seconds.
  • Aphrodite’s Rite of Flourishing: Villagers train slower and cost more, but after 10 minutes, their numbers double and production returns to normal.
  • Horus’ Ancestral Protection: Units resurrect automatically 30 seconds after death, with reduced hitpoints.
  • Hel’s Mythic Frenzy: Myth units cost no favor and have double hitpoints, but train at half speed.

Seasonal System – Always Active:

In addition to the World Twist, every game includes seasonal effects that evolve over time. One of the following weather systems is chosen at random:

Freyr’s Harsh Weather:

  • Spring: Faster human unit production
  • Summer: Forest fires erupt
  • Autumn: Villagers gather food twice as fast
  • Winter: Random unit freezing

Loki’s Harsh Weather:

  • Adds Dark Winter: Human units: -30% speed. Myth units: +30% speed

Loki & Freyr’s Harsh Weather:

  • Snowy Winter: Adds a favor trickle
  • Mighty Winter: Spawns hostile Fimbulwinter Wolves near all Town Centers

Recommended Use:

Perfect for 1v1s, team matches, or free-for-alls. Every match plays out differently and forces players to adapt on the fly. Excellent for players seeking dynamic, replayable, and unpredictable battles.

Feedback & Contact

Have ideas for new twists, seasonal effects, or balance suggestions?

Contact me at jayo7.aom@gmail.com

Thanks for playing – and enjoy the divine chaos!

This is a mod to be played against AI. It's supposed to be a challenge. Now a few steps for you to follow and how to accomplish the challenge:

1. Pick Zeus as your God, you will be able to train every Greek Myth Unit if you choose the correct Minor God for each age (you'll see the right one shows all the myth units for that age.). Also all Myth Units have ridiculously buffed stats like HP, Damage, Attack Speed, Armor, Reduced Cooldown and all of them cost -2 pop.

2. Put 11 Legendary AI (trust me you are very powerful just do it) on team 2 and this part is important you MUST pick the Humanoid profile for all AI's. Then make sure you DO NOT choose ANY GREEK for the AI!! They will be very powerful.

3. Choose the map Great Wall, why? Because if you don't you'll get crushed easily. In this map the AI takes some time to destroy the wall and even after they do they'll just keep attacking it if for a long time if you don't go near them. Important note to pick map size at least Large so you can have some space.

The goal is to survive and unleash the myth unit army onto the mere mortal army of 11 AI. It is a lot of fun for casual players!

Castle Blood 
Welcome to Castle Blood, a fast-paced and action-packed custom scenario inspired by the classic "Castle Blood" mode from AoE II, reimagined in Age of Mythology Retold.

Every player starts with a fortified base, powerful god units, and access to mythic armies. The goal? Destroy enemy castles and rack up kills to earn powerful reinforcements. The more you fight, the stronger you become.

Key Features:

⚔️ Instant myth unit spawns and auto-respawning heroes
🏰 Fortified castles with defensive upgrades
💥 No economy – pure strategy and combat
☀️ Osiris or other god powers may strike unexpectedly
👑 Last team or player standing wins!
Ideal for 2-6 players in free-for-all or team battles. Jump in, pick your god, and prepare for nonstop carnage!

This map simply replaces Isis with Ra, due to the large number of exploits that only that civilization has.

    Up to 235 favor per minute if you bless your monuments and the wonder with Sons of Osiris.

    Infinite phoenix population.

How to do it:
Damage your wonder either by yourself (Locust Swarm, Meteor) or by the enemy.
Use the Pharaoh or Son of Osiris to bless the wonder.
You get 2 or 2.07 favor per second respectively, which is equivalent to having two wonders.

This allows you to generate a crazy amount of myth units and can be combined with the infinite phoenix population exploit, which consists of deleting your own phoenixes so they turn into eggs and don’t count towards the population, letting you create many more before they are reborn, ignoring the population limit, and this can be done over and over again. (Set can also create phoenixes, but it’s not a big problem since their favor rate is much lower.)

This wouldn’t be a problem in a 1v1, but in large FFA games or with many teams, it puts anyone who isn’t Isis at a disadvantage, considering that they also get protection against god powers.

This has already been reported to the developers, but there has been no feedback yet.

Description

The Lithobolos is a Greek-themed ballista available from the Fortress in the Castle Age. It specializes in countering archers, dealing bonus damage to ranged units and offering the Greeks a solid anti-archer option in the mid-game. This unit features a brand-new 3D model, the first of its kind in Age of Mythology: Retold. It was created using a custom-built importer and exporter developed specifically for the game’s model format, marking an early step toward true custom asset support in the modding community.

How it was Made

First, you can use the scripts found here to import and export .tmm and .tma files: https://github.com/robert-d-schultz/Age-Of-Mythology-Retold-Modding-Scripts
The .tmm exporter is not quite complete, models in-game will look a little strange.

AoM:R currently (or the last time I checked) has issues with loading brand new models. So what this mod does is merge my new model into the existing norse ballista model. An "invisible" material is then be used to hide one of the ballistas, depending on the owner's culture.

Credits

Model - ChaosRobie
Textures - ChaosRobie
Implementation - ChaosRobie
File Format Decoding - ChaosRobie
Special thanks to my good friend Buppy

General description

My moded units can be easily found in the editor, just search for "Age of Heroes" or "Extra"

There is no need to download my "tale of the dragon portraits mod" anymore, they are now included and merged in a different way in this mod.

-Adds campaign heroes to skirmish. 

-Adds special abilities to greek heroes and some others.

-Adds several all new heroes to skirmish, all of them made from assets from the game. (Sun Wukong, Medea, Calipso, Sigurd, Beowulf, Shen Gongbao, Hervor, Ninja chief and some others).

*Fully Compatible with IA skirmish.

*The heroes can't die, they work like in the campaign, and depends on the gods (Minor and Major) you choose wich are avalaiable. *Not Made to play in campaign mode, use at your oun risk. 

-Adds some titan variations: Osiris, Chi You, Gaia, Kronos, and Prometheus, the atlantean one is now greek (Cerberus is unique to Hades), and some experimental new ones (Athena, Fenrir and Pangu) *No more size bug*

-Adds visual variations to houses (tents and shrines), docks (Shipyards), berry bushes (pumpkins) and Obelisks.

-Adds Ampibious movement to some units that can fly, are big enough, or don't need to breathe (Automaton and Draugr).

-Includes my Extended Retold Edition mod (Extended edition units and discarded units from retold)

-Includes my Dwarvens of Thor mod (some units and buildings exclusives for Thor)

-Already includes my "titans and wonders names" and "better regent" mods

-I reccomend to merge with my "congruent materials and ranks mod".

All mods included in this overhaul will be uploaded individually soon. If you just want some of them please wait until the update. (This pack will be avalible aswell)

Hope you enjoy my mods, Thanks for your support and special thanks to Youtube channel "Modding AOM", his tutorials helped me a lot at the begining, and CryShana for her CryBarEditor.

Also the modeling part was possible thanks to the importing/exporting tools made by MissionLemur128 and robert-d-schultz found on github and the ones that developers have provided us ingame.

Massive mod with tons of new units with new visuals for every race, new technologies, leveling system, respawn system thats allows to AI build ~600-700 limit Armies! 
 
At Youtube channel "Retrematonium" you can check how game with this mod looks like 
 
Respawn System: 
Simple works as Egyptian Pharaon: after death and 30 sec time respawns units again 
 
Town Center - Respawn Heroes and some unique units (around ~100-150 limit of units at Myth Age) 
Temple - Respawn Myth units (around ~100-200 limit of units at Myth Age) 
Fort - Respawn millitary units and some heroes (around ~100-200 limit of units at Myth Age) 
 
AI uses all of them, now standart AI wave size is 600-700 limit and forever infinite spam. 
 
Leveling System: 
All heroes and T3\T4 Age Mythincal units have leveling system: 
The more damage they dealt - the more powefull they become 
Standart heroes and myth units have MAX 25 LvL (3 times more power at 25 LVL) 
Unique Heroes and Titans have 30-50 MAX LvL (7 times more power at 50 LVL) 
To check which level your unit - maximum energy shield small blue icon, located near hp and attack values. 
 
New Tech: 
Adds New Epic technologies for each race, tech them fast before AI, because when AI gets them it becomes too strong. 
 
 
New Units: 
Adds Tons of new heroes and units with new abilities to ALL Races. 
Each Race have their own Unique heroes and powerfull divine hero with all t4 god powers and its own specs.

Unique heroes - Legendary Fanatic,Legendary Fanatic Spearman, Legendary Contarius, Praetorians Spearman, Elite Praetorians,Legendary Praetorians and more.  
All of them have unique look and abilities. 
 
China - LiJing - 22 ranged attacker with mass aoe damage

Xamo's The Maze Runner

4 human players and 1 computer player new adventure scenario, as an adaptation of the movie with the same name.
The goal is to collect all the keys (relics) from 8 sectors in order to get to the next sector. The keys must be stored into the base at the Keys Storege Place. Once you got the last key (8), you'll have access to the WICKED BASE and you'll win the game.
Players have a little autoheal, but if it happen your hero to die, he'll respawn again in the base.
Enjoy a creative map, a lot of eye-candy stuff and a relaxing scenario.
ATTENTION: Player 5 have to be a computer player!

modName: (FR) Le Conte du Dragon RETOLD - Campagne Complète
description:
La campagne "Le Conte du Dragon" de Age of Mythology Extended Edition recreee et adaptee pour la civilisation chinoise d'Age of Mythology Retold !

 

Ce mod contient : 

- 9 missions jouables
- 23 cartes en comptant les cutscenes
- 1 menu de campagne dedie accessible via le menu "Campagne personnalisee"
- 1 dossier contenant des images d'AOM Extended Edition utilisee dans la campagne
- 1 page de strings contenant la traduction complete du mod en francais

Ce mod propose :
- Une refonte graphique massive des cartes de la campagne originale
- Une histoire plus aboutie, notamment par l'ajout de nouvelles cutscenes adaptees aux nouveaux ajouts de la civilisation chinoise d'Age of Mythology Retold
- Des objectifs et des quetes secondaires inedits
- De tous nouveaux evenements en jeu
- Des mecaniques de jeu innovantes pour se rapprocher de l'esprit de la civilisation chinoise d'AOM Extended Edition
- Des nouveaux personnages qui accompagnent les heros dans leur aventure

/!\ Avoir simultanement les versions francaises et anglaises du mod peut entrainer un souci : si les deux sont activees, l'une des deux ne sera pas accessible. Si vous avez les deux versions, veillez a n'en activer qu'une seule a la fois.

Cette nouvelle version du Conte du Dragon vous permettra de profiter d'une campagne fraiche et tres ambitieuse avec des mecaniques uniques et une adaptation plus moderne et aboutie de la campagne originale !
Profitez du fruit de plus de 1500 heures et 4 mois de travail acharne pour vous proposer une campagne qui cherche a s'inscrire au meme niveau que les campagnes officielles, faite par des fans de longue date d'AOM pour des fans d'AOM.

Mod par : Shocolachou et Rock

(Discord : jay_shotachou, charlie_yot)

Remerciements : Yeebaagooon (Un des createurs de la campagne originale), SK (Template du menu de campagne), Hikaru (Logo)

modName: (ENG) Tale of the Dragon RETOLD - Full Campaign
description:
/NEW\ Looking for more challenges? Prove your faith towards Fuxi by completing his tests! By typing the command "CHALLENGE ME FUXI" in the chat, you will have access to at least one new challenging side objective per mission, which have been thought to put the players' skills to the test! /NEW\


The campaign "Tale of the Dragon" from Age of Mythology Extended Edition recreated and adapted to the Chinese civilization from Age of Mythology Retold!


 This mod contains :

- 9 playable missions 
- 23 maps including the cinematics 
- 1 campaign menu accessible thanks to the "Custom Campaign" menu 
- 1 folder containing images from AOM Extended Edition which are used in the campaign


This mod offers :

- A massive graphic rework of the original campaign 
- A more complete story (in particular thanks to the cinematics) which fits perfectly with the features from AOM Retold's Chinese civilization 
- New objectives and side quests 
- New events in game 
- Innovative game mechanics to catch the spirit of AOM Extended Edition's Chinese civilization 
- New characters who join our adventure 

/!\ Having both english and french versions of the mod can make a problem appear : if both are activated, only one campaign will be accessible, if you downloaded the two versions, make sure only one is activated at a time. /!\


This new version of the Tale of the Dragon will allow you to enjoy a modern and ambitious campaign with unique features with a more complete version of the original one!
Enjoy the fruit of over 1500 hours and 4 months of hardwork to offer you a campaign which aim to perform the same level of quality as official ones, created by old good AOM fans for AOM fans!

Mod by : Shocolachou, Rock
(Discord : jay_shotachou, charlie_yot)

Special thanks : Yeebaagooon (one of the creators of the original campaign), SK (Template of the campaign menu), Hikaru (Logo)

Warriors who control the sacred theater complex will claim its gold and strategic dominance - but the map's heart holds the dreaded Plutonium, the legendary Gate to the underworld where poisonous vapors once killed all who dared approach. Battle wisely in this realm where gods and mortals collide.

modName: Fast Age-Up: 1 Sek,  Zero Costs, No building prerequisites - By Nergico
description:
All Age-Up research times reduced to 1 second, all resource costs set to 0, and no building prerequisites required for every god and minor god—except for Age V, which still requires a Wonder to be built, so you can test Age IV features without accidentally jumping straight to Age V.

Covers all existing pantheons (Greek, Egyptian, Norse, Atlantean) plus the Chinese DLC. Future gods added by upcoming DLCs will theoretically be supported; if any new Age-Up technologies aren’t automatically included, the mod can be updated to cover them.

Why This Mod Exists?
This mod was created for personal use to enable fast advancement through every Age for thorough mod testing. As a modder who frequently needs to start at Age I and test features up to the final Age, waiting through normal research timers, resource farms, and building requirements was impractical. This mod eliminates all downtime and roadblocks.

Additive XML
This mod is additive, meaning it should continue to work normally after updates and should not conflict with other mods.

Enjoy truly instant, resource-free Age-Up for every pantheon—now including the Chinese DLC, and ready for any future gods!

If you have any suggestions for improvements or found something  feel free to let me know!

If you would like to support me, I would greatly appreciate a donation for the hard work!
https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=SR3LW4CCUVBPN

Xamo's B.Y.O. War 3 - a.k.a. Build Your Own War 3

This is almost the supreme test for a agile and quick player of AOM Retold.
4 players map, where players start with no resources, until they gather 1000 wood (~ 1.5 min.), when all players will receive plenty of resources to start maybe the biggest challange in mods world.
Nothing is disabled, forbiden, or hidden, ... but, the civilizations are random and teams are locked.
Population limit is set to 200 for a smooth game without lag.
Ah, almost forgot: some rates are speeded up, so all depends on how fast the players are ...

Have fun, kill all and win the game!

Additive data mod that improves the combat effectiveness of all campaign major heroes (i.e., ones with hitpoint regeneration). It increases their hitpoint regeneration rate by 33% to 50% and adds 50% of their base damage as divine damage. This mod affects both friendly and enemy campaign major heroes.

Nomads In Midgard is a replayable scenario inspired by the first Norse level "North" in the Fall Of The Trident campaign. Your units start in a randomised location and must search for a settlement to build a Town Center, after that you must survive 5 snow storms where enemies will attack your town. If your Town Center falls, you lose.

Godpowers are not obtained by worshipping minor gods. Instead you must place 3 Relics near a Statue of Thor and select a godpower from a choice of 3. You can offer Relics to Statues 4 times, each time the powers you receive increase in strength.

Nomads in Midgard features :

  • Dynamic fight music
  • Optional side objectives
  • Optional mutations that can make the scenario easier, harder or weirder
  • Difficulty scaling based on if the player is doing well, or if they are struggling
  • Randomised starting locations, resources placements and enemy encounters
  • All 6 cultures are playable
  • Custom godpowers (Ragnarok now works in a small radius and can effect Human Infantry, The Son of Osiris can work on any Hero and Meteor now fires a single shot, but has a fast charge time and lots more...)

In your game, units, heroes, and myth units can now level up by dealing damage. The amount of damage required to level up is customized for each unit, with stronger units needing to deal more damage.

Military Units

Rank 0: +15% HP and Damage, Heals 0.5 HP per second
Rank 1: +30% HP and Damage, Heals 0.75 HP per second
Rank 2: +50% HP and Damage, Heals 1 HP per second

Myth Units

Rank 0: +20% HP, Heals 0.5 HP per second
Rank 1: +40% HP, Heals 1 HP per second
Rank 2: +60% HP, Heals 1.5 HP per second
Rank 3: +80% HP, Heals 2 HP per second

Heroes

Rank 0: +20% HP, Special attack cooldown reduced by 10%
Rank 1: +35% HP, Special attack cooldown reduced by 20%, Heals 0.5 HP per second
Rank 2: +50% HP, Special attack cooldown reduced by 30%, Heals 1 HP per second
Rank 3: +70% HP, Special attack cooldown reduced by 40%, Heals 1.5 HP per second
Rank 4: +100% HP, Special attack cooldown reduced by 50%, Heals 2 HP per second
 
Due to a known bug, the amount of damage dealt by standard and myth units will no longer be displayed when using this system. The damage dealt by heroes will still be visible.

Ameliore la traduction française du jeu et change certains noms d'unites :

Noms repris du jeu d'origine (ou qui s'en rapproche) :
Glaneur > Amasseur
Turme > Turma
Hétaire  > Hetairos
Laquais > Serviteur
Serviteur > Serviteur d'Ocean
Colline fortifiee > Fort de la colline
Anti-caserne > Contre-caserne

Autres changement de noms :
Drakkar  (doublon avec le Dreki et le Navire dragon) > Langskip
Muraille fortifiee (mot-cle pour les tours et des forteresses) > Fortification
Unite de cavalerie aux Chevaux Blancs (trop long) > Cavalier du Cheval Blanc
Unite de cavalerie du Tigre (trop long) >  Cavalier du Tigre

Ainsi que de nombreuses corrections dans l'interface, les descriptions etc.

Si vous trouvez d'autres erreurs de traduction ou si vous avez d'autres suggestions, n'hesitez pas d'en faire part sur le forum (le lien de la discussion est indiquee dans la page web de ce mod).

Mod compatible multijoueur.

In Mythology there are many different stories of places and events that occurred, here is one of ours.

Asphodel Meadows, a section of the Greek Underworld where the majority of souls are sent to live after death. Grey fields with tall, pale flowers. Sky is dull, horizonless, no sun or moon. Souls drift here in a state of forgetfulness or passive existence. The setting is quiet, melancholic and still.

Images below are some examples of what the map could produce.


AoM has limited resources so we work with what we have. Thanks for playing. 
This pack contains the original map, plus a nomad version - v2.


You can find the map video here at the DoD YouTube:
https://youtu.be/VP7T7VOwgiI?si=ZThYdkcz3Hfu1O5H

[DoD] Clan for discussion on the map and AoM: https://discord.com/invite/Q4nR7Re7tp

This collection contains 10 maps edited to vary the survival gameplay style, perfect for those who love maps with no resources. Each map requires distinct strategies, so explore and try out new techniques. Immerse yourself in unique challenges and diverse strategies on each of these maps:

1. Arena: Players start with base walls in a tight combat zone.

2. Ghost Lake: Frozen terrain with a central ice lake that cannot be built upon, forcing expansion around its edges.

3. Highland: Terrain divided by rivers with shallow crossings, creating natural chokepoints.

4. Jotunheim: Cold, harsh terrain with limited movement options.

5. Mount Olympus: Mountainous battlefield with dramatic elevation.

6. Muspellheim: Volcanic ground with lava flows and fiery hazards.

7. Nile Shallows: Shallow waters and dry banks shape the fight.

8. Tiny: Compact map offering limited space but enough room for tactical movement and positioning.

9. Unknown: Random terrain every match, always unpredictable.

10. Vinlandsaga: Rugged coastal terrain inspired by Norse exploration.

- Maps adapted to survival mode by: Zeledon X.

- From the icy lands of Jotunheim to the volcanic chaos of Muspellheim, each map offers a distinct experience to test your survival skills. Explore, conquer, and survive in the Survival Pack Maps!

- Note: To ensure a smoother and more balanced start, starting resources have been rebalanced, and a selection of buildings and technologies is available from the beginning, giving players a more immersive survival experience right from the start. It also includes a Survival Compendium that randomly selects one map from the full survival map set.

The house limit is set at 10, as in the original game (5 for manors).

The limit for villagers has been halved (from 100 to 50). The same for citizens (from 50 to 25).
This is lower than the legacy limit (80), except for citizens, for balancing reasons, particularly on the AI side.

A mod that allows for less intense gameplay in the late game.

Lore More Focused Age of Mythology-Atlanteans is a complete reimagining of the Atlantean Major Gods.

It's still in a very early stage.
Definitely unfinished and likely quite unbalanced.

This release is mostly to test the waters and see what kind of feedback the ideas receive.
If the feedback is positive, I’ll invest more time and effort into refining and expanding it. 

Unfortunately, the game currently does not support uploading custom 3D models through mods. 

As a result, this version uses only placeholder assets (no custom models, sounds, animations, or special effects).

Despite the limitations, I hope you’ll enjoy it!

modName: No horned helmet for Axeman and Huskarl (PORTRAITS ONLY)
description:
Remove horns from the helmets in the PORTRAITS of Throwing Axemen and Huskarls (NOT THE 3D MODELS). To be closer to the original game and more historically accurate.

These changes ONLY AFFECT THE UI. To remove the horns on the 3D models, check out this mod : https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/297750/

This mod is multiplayer compatible, unlike the one that modifies 3D models.

Single player game, you vs computer.

You'll play Regeinleif then Amanra then Nichou/Circe from the campaign with some custom abilities. Your goal is to beat the five challenges.

Time duration of the game is approximatively 30 min. It's not a supremacy map, more like a boss fight map where you have to dodge some attacks and kill the right enemies.

 

It's a scenario map.

Download the game then put the scenario .mythscn into your folder Games/Age of Mythology Retold/765515515115/scenario

Then you can play it, enjoy !

update : set player 2 as computer, it should work in skirmish now => select scenario and The five challenges.

Tower Defence Battles is an epic twist on the classic TD mechanics!  
While the regular tower defence mechanics apply, this time YOU are responsible for spawning creeps and sending them against your foes while defending your base! The premise is simple yet the game mechanics and possible strategies are complex. 
Obviously you’ll need gold to send attacks, and you’ll get a regular shipment of gold on top of a bounty for making kills. So why bother sending lesser units when you are giving the enemy a bounty on kills and you could just save for the big units? The answer is that sending units will increase your income! Accessing the stronger units is impossible without increasing your income, so you must balance the income you have on defence, attack and investment. 
 
With randomised god powers, skins, team support and the ability to choose which player to attack – how long will you last against your opponents? 
 
***This is a random map, final player MUST BE A NO AI CPU.***

Zombie Escape a 4 humans(runners) v 1 zombie(hunter) game mode. Featuring additional objectives to the classic escape mode. This mode is meant to have a challenging surivial spin. There are currently three maps and four zombie types. Lobby voting does not support controller.

Humans must escape through one of the two heavenly stairs. Zombies must kill the humans before they escape. Each stairs is protected by a gate. Humans must collect relics and place them into shrines and repair them to damage the gates. Additionally, humans can use the relics to gain buffs or god powers from other structures. Check the names for what it provides. There are various vehicles that humans can garrison to take control over. There are also multiple loot items to gather to increase your build/repair speed, hp, shields, attack and resources. Each civilization has their own unique buildings and each god has their own starting god powers.

Zombies grow stronger over time, gaining more gold. They may use the gold at their zombie to purchase more army or god powers. There are multiple zombie types, each with their unique ability and unique shop items.

Map is fully random and so are the zombie's shop and repairable structures between each game.

Players 1 to 4 will be humans while player 5 is zombie.
Player 6, 7, and 8 must be AI and are just placeholders for gameplay.

Good luck and have fun!

You may leave feedback at nottud's AOM discord(https://discord.gg/bnxPmNJaPj). There is a zombie-escape channel there.

   3. Put the Legacy Hero Voicelines mod in your user folder Users\Games\Age of Mythology Retold\76561198331235717\mods\local

An update to my old mod that replaces the unit barks for all the campaign heroes with their original VA. Now remade from the ground up, tested, and works with the new audio system!

DOES NOT REPLACE THE CUTSCENE OR CAMPAIGN DIALOGUE, ONLY THE UNIT VOICES!!!!!!

Effects Agamemnon, Ajax, Amanra, Arkantos, Arkantos (Blessed), Brokk, Chiron, Eitri, Gargarensis, Kastor, Kemsyt, Odysseus, Reginleif, and Setna.

Kamos and King Folstag are uneffected, as their orginal barks are just the generic Minotaur and Frost Giant ones.

Not been able to find the right files to replace Arkantos' battlecry audio, if anyone knows where these are i'll be more than happy to integrate that too!

Feel free to use as a basis for your own audio mods!

This mapset is a twist on the standard maps, where each map has been significantly reduced in size! However, its not quite as small as the typical "Tiny" gamemodes, which move away from the standard skirmish gameplay. 
 
These maps still facilitate all that you would expect from skirmish games, but in a tiny playing field.  
 
Custom rules applied: 
Resources last 3x longer / fatten 3x faster. 
Farms cost 4x more, but gather 2x faster. 
Trade Caravans gather 1.5x faster. 
 
Currently including:
Mini Arena 
Mini Ghost Lake 
Mini Mediterranean  
More to come!

Additive data mod that improves the combat effectiveness of all Arena of the Gods (AotG) legends. It increases their hitpoint regeneration by 33% to 50% and adds 50% of their base damage as divine damage.

Replaces Inari Ōkami's portrait with a historically informed version: in the form of a young goddess (and not as a fox, which is not the dominant Shintō portrayal and is even deemed incorrect by some priests) carrying a batch of rice, riding a nine-tailed kitsune, with her messenger white foxes running in a rice paddy in the second plan; the background features a tea plantation and a swamp. This is to reflect the fact Inari is also a kami of tea (a fact not mentioned in the game text anywhere) and according to the myth was the one who brought a then unnamed cereal growing in the swamps to the Japanese people during a time of grave famine - which is probably the reason behind her Swampland god power in the game.

modName: The Last Stand at Imset Valley
description:
Gargarensis has trapped you, Amanra, at the end of the winding Imset Valley. He now prepares his final assault. Fend off his attacks as you await divine intervention from Isis.

Use armies, walls, and towers to hold Gargarensis at bay. Search the Imset Valley Highlands for secrets and resources to bolster your chances. Survive long enough to awaken the powerful Guardian of Isis in this handcrafted singleplayer scenario.

Launch this mission from the Skirmish menu under "custom scenarios." For the best experience, please do not change lobby settings before playing.

Players find themselves in an abandoned cave mine.  Destroy the abandoned forges for bonus gold, and play on Regicide mode for a custom Regent, the Fire King, Halogi.

Preview of the map: https://youtu.be/niKgKx_2VWg?si=WW7E5S-yscQmgu5Y
[DoD] Clan for discussion on the map and AoM: https://discord.com/invite/Q4nR7Re7tp

This mod adds a new tech which is a slightly altered version of the original game tech "Pig Sticker". As in the original game, this is a THOR ONLY technology, thus it is only available when playing as Thor. It can be researched at the Oxcart. It increases huntable gather rate by 10% and greatly increases villager attack against them. Mod is written as additive mod, so should be compatible with any other mod. This mod is compatible with my other "New Technology - Hunting Dogs" modification.

modName: The Last Stand at Imset Valley - Campaign Version
description:
You are Amanra. Gargarensis has trapped you at the end of the winding Imset Valley. He now prepares his final assault. Fend off his attacks as you await divine intervention from Isis.

Use armies, towers and walls to hold Gargarensis at bay. Search the Imset Valley Highlands for secrets and resources to bolster your chances. Survive long enough to awaken the powerful Guardian of Isis in this handcrafted custom scenario.

This version of the map is loaded via the custom campaigns button in your campaign menu.

After centuries of waiting and building an army,the Underlord Asur wishes to over-throw the people of Ashira by unleashing with servants against you.Play as Alera as you close his portals and try to slay Asur, with help from allies.

Diese Mod fügt eine neue Technologie hinzu. Bei dieser handelt es sich um eine leicht abgeänderte Version der gleichen Technologie "Schweinespieß" aus dem originalem Spiel. Wie im Original, handelt es sich um eine Thor exklusive Technologie, somit steht diese nur Thor zur Entwicklung zur Verfügung. Sie erhöht die Arbeitsrate von Dorfbewohnern für Nahrung von jagdbaren Tieren um 10% und erhöht die Angriffsrate von Dorfbewohnern gegen diese drastisch. Diese Mod ist nicht kompatibel mit der von mir erstellten englischen Version "New Technology - Pig Sticker".

(Additive Mod) 
- Relics, Settlements and KingOfTheHill Treasury are guarded by slowly respawning mythic units fitting to the highest age and map (80%) or random ones (20% or if map type can not be detected, based on trees). 
- Especially Norse players will profit from this, since they can fight for favor without attacking a player. 
- Settle the settlements or destroy the flags near relics/KotH to stop the spawning. 
- AI might have a little more trouble, since it sends single villagers/heroes to settlements/relics and losses the first small armies, but after a few attempts it usually defeats them. 
- Do not choose a too small map, otherwise it might happen they can attack your start settlement. 
 
1.01:
- improve check-human/computer code (previous did remove ability button from SkyPassage) 
1.02: 
- relics spawned nearby a temple do not spawn guards (eg. my Free Relic on Ageup mod)

If you want to report bugs or feedback, write to User "serp66" in the official "Age of Empires" discord channel.

A small map of Europe and the Mediterranean sea (size 512x512). The mod contains 12 versions of the map for each number of players. Each player starts with a transport ship (containing one citizen) with a speed boost for 2 minutes.

There is also an experimental map where players spawn automatically depending on the chosen god:
-Zeus: Greece
-Hades: Carpathians
-Poseidon: Black sea coast
-Isis: Egypt
-Ra: Libya
-Set: Syria
-Thor: Scandinavia
-Odin: East Germania
-Loki: England
-Oranos: Rome
-Kronos: Carthage
-Gaia: Hispania

Use 'Allow dummy AI players' to manage AI players (or no AI slots) in multiplayer for the experimental map (while waiting for developers to officially add this feature). 
NB: Some AIs have difficulty developing their cities in certain regions where space is lacking (especially in Italy, Greece and England).

Welcome! This mod provides an Indonesian language translation for the game Age of Mythology: Retold.

Selamat datang! Mod ini menyediakan terjemahan Bahasa Indonesia untuk game Age of Mythology: Retold.

IMPORTANT: Please Read
This mod was created entirely using automatic translation software (like Google Translate, DeepL, and AI Software). With a total text volume of over 2.6 million characters, it is highly likely that you will encounter grammatical errors, inaccuracies, or mixed languages. So, I apologize for any and all shortcomings.

Mod ini sepenuhnya dibuat menggunakan software terjemahan otomatis (seperti Google Translate, DeepL, dan Software AI). Dengan total teks lebih dari 2,6 juta karakter, kemungkinan besar Kalian akan menemukan beberapa kesalahan tata bahasa, kata-kata yang kurang akurat, atau percampuran bahasa. Jadi, Saya minta maaf atas segala kekurangan yang ada.

Enable the Language
This mod REPLACES the Malay language option in the game.

  • After you activated this Mod.
  • Go to the Settings > UI > Language.
  • Now the Malay has changed to Indonesian.

Mod ini akan MENGGANTIKAN opsi Bahasa Melayu di dalam game.

  • Setelah kalian mengaktifkan Mod ini.
  • Pergi ke Setting (Pengaturan) > UI > Language (Bahasa)
  • Sekarang Bahasa Melayu telah berganti menjadi Bahasa Indonesia

Feedback & Update
I will try to fix translation errors or inaccurate words when possible. If you find any mistakes or have suggestions for better wording, please feel free to let me know.

As this is a solo project managed by just one person, I cannot promise regular updates, especially for minor game patches. I will work on fixes and improvements in my spare time.

Saya akan berusaha untuk memperbaiki kesalahan terjemahan atau kata-kata yang kurang akurat jika memungkinkan. Jika Anda menemukan kesalahan atau memiliki masukan untuk perbaikan kata, jangan ragu untuk memberitahu saya.

Karena mod ini adalah proyek solo yang saya kerjakan seorang diri, saya tidak bisa menjanjikan pembaruan secara berkala, terutama untuk update game yang sifatnya minor. Semua perbaikan akan saya usahakan di sela-sela waktu luang.

Game Version This mod was created and tested on Age of Mythology: Retold version Update 18.50572.

Thank you and enjoy the game!

Terima kasih dan selamat bermain!

ADDITIVE MOD (Changelog at the end)
 
. --- What the mod does? 
 
Allows you to train ONE Legend from Arena of the Gods mode in the Shrine. 
 
. --- How do I train the legends? 
 
Reach Classical Age with any civilization. One special villager will spawn in your town center. Build the shrine and train the Legend you want. After training your Legend, the special villager is useless. 
 
. --- What if i my special villager dies?

The villager will respawn if killed, so don't worry if for some unknown reason your villager died so early. I made the shrine able to contain ONE single unit, so you can garisson the villager in the shrine and completely forget about it. 
 
. --- Can I train the Legends in Gauntlet? 
 
YES, the Legends provided by this mod are "variants" with the exact same stats as the original ones and the variants does not share any build limit with the original ones. So yes, now you can train 1 extra Legend in Gauntlet.

. --- Is the Variant Legend equally strong?

Yes and no. I did not make any of those variants work with the gauntlets techtree. So your original Legend will begin weaker, but will end stronger than the variant because of how Gauntlet works.
 
. --- What does your last update changes for me, skirmish player?

Nothing.

. --- What does your last update changes for me, gauntlet player?

You can train one extra Legend now.

. --- Can Bots train Legends? 
 
Unfortunately no. They don't build the shrine. 
 
. --- Is there something you're not aware of? 
 
I haven't finished Arena of the Gods, so I don't know all Legends. 
 
 
 
SPECIFIC INFORMATIONS 
 
The Shrine is from the original game files, so any mod that modifies the Shrine will work (or is supposed to, at least).

The Special Villager and the "Legends" are exclusives from this mod. The original Legends are no longer trained, but their variants. 
 
 
 
To report bugs or ask for update, notify me writing to the user andregabriel7011 in the "Age of Empires" Official Discord channel 



SPECIAL THANKS

. Duxblah
. Eskiss
. Serp
. Slush
. Thanik
. And the whole modding community :D

CHANGELOG

1.1.1:
. Code cleanliness
. Legends from this mod now have an (A) to make it easier to identify.
. Special Thanks section 
1.1.0:
. Original Legends aren't trained anymore. Instead, you train a copy of the Legend (Which is, obviously, exactly like the Legend of your choice). This way, you can now enjoy having 2 Legends on Arena of the Gods if you want. Hopefully, this won't change anything in normal modes.
1.0.1:
. Added the Blue Ring and the Blue Beam on every Legend, except for Legend Kastor (These effects are already from Legend Kastor)
. Added the Hero Ring and Hero Glow on Legend Kastor

modName: Qing Rider and Bow Cavalry for the Chinese
description:
This mod allows you to train Qing Riders and Bow Cavalry in the Chinese Baolei. These units appeared in the game files with the Immortal Pillars expansion; they were likely originally designed as trainable Chinese units, but were removed from the final release. This mod also enables the construction of the Baolei with Houtu "Advanced Defenses" technology (Nüwa and Shennong), allowing you to train Qing Riders in the Second Age. Levy and Conscript Baolei Soldiers reduce the training time of Qing Rider and Bow Cavalry. Additionally, you can research Ranged Soldier upgrades on the Baolei and some bugs that prevented Bow Cavalry from being affected by these upgrades have been fixed. In a future update, I plan to add hotkeys to the included units and technologies.

Have fun!

-Thor: Scandinavia
-Odin: Germania
-Loki: Gaul
-Oranos: Rome

-Gaia: Hispania

Replaces Theia's portrait with an image based on the only known surviving portrayal of the titaness at the Altar of Pergamon. Since the sculpture is not preserved in its entirety (lower torso, left arm and nose are missing), some liberties had to be taken. The pose, hairdo and robe strictly follow the preserved parts of the sculpture. I reflected the fact Theia was believed to give gold and gems their shine by making her wear several types of jewelry. In the background I put a scene where the Sun, the Moon and the Dawn are all visible, to refer to Theia's three children - Helios, Selene and Eos.

Part of the Historically Informed Portraits set.

Every Major God now grants their entire team one of their original bonuses:

  • Zeus grants your team's Infantry +60% bonus damage against buildings.
  • Hades grants your team's Ranged Soldiers and Heroes +1 Range and Line of Sight.
  • Poseidon grants your team's Cavalry, Caravans, and Myth Units +0.1 Speed per Age.
  • Ra allows your team's workers to gather from Berry Bushes 25% faster.
  • Isis grants your team's Town Centers and Citadel Centers support for +5 population.
  • Set makes your teams's Military Production and Fortress-like buildings cost 25% less Wood and Gold.
  • Thor grants your team a Dwarf at their Armories whenever they finish researching and Armory technology.
  • Odin allows your team's Heroes to regenerate 0.4 Hit Points per second.
  • Loki grants your team's Human Soldiers and Heroes +10% counter damage.
  • Freyr lets your team's buildings be repaired for free.
  • Kronos returns to your team 20% of the resource cost of their lost Siege Weapons and Myth Units.
  • Oranos grants your team's Units +4 Line of Sight.
  • Gaia makes your team's generic Economic upgrades 35% cheaper.
  • Fuxi gives your team's buildings 60% increased base research rate.*
  • Nuwa grants your team's Cavalry +10% Hit Points.
  • Shennong grants your team Plow, Irrigation, and Flood Control instantly and for free in their respective ages.
  • Amaterasu grants your team a small trickle of 0.5 Gold per second.**
  • Tsukuyomi grants your team a free Kitsune at their Temples at each Age.
  • Susanoo grants your team's units 33% faster ability recharge.

Each God always benefits from their own Team Bonus, even in 1v1 or Free for All games. Team bonuses cannot stack with the same team bonus. Team bonuses are activated at the start of the game, and remain active even if an ally is defeated or changes teams.

* Fuxi's buildings on Favored Land has their research rate reduced to only 150% faster to compensate for his Team Bonus's unconditional increase to the base research rate. The bonus from Fuxi's Favored Land multiplies with his Team Bonus, totaling in the original +300%. (This means Fuxi is actually the only God who is buffed in the mod.)

** Amaterasu's Bushidō Gold trickle now starts at 0 at Tier 1 to compensate for her Team Bonus granting everyone (including herself) a +0.5 Gold trickle, resulting is the same total trickle per Bushidō tier.

Language: English

Instead, I focused on attested features such as bull's horns, crown of seaweed and the Pillars of Heracles as a symbol of the edge of the world as the ancient Greeks knew it. 
 
Part of the Historically Informed Portraits set.

# Trainable Relics 
 
Mod by andr9528 (GitHub) / WolfDK (Discord / Steam) / WolfDK1996 (Age of Empire). 
 
## Description 
 
Do you often play long games, well into the Wonder Age, with an abundance of resources and nothing to spend it on? 
Here is a mod for you. 
 
Adds ability to "train" relics from the wonder at a scaling (1.5x) cost. 
Has Cross-compatibility with my 5x Relics mod, increasing the starting cost of relics by 4x. 
 
This is an additive mod, so it should not conflict with any other mod. 
 
## Issues 
 
Should any issues be found, fell free to create an issue on the GitHub Page <https://github.com/andr9528/Retold-Mods>.

# 5x Effective Relics 
 
Mod by andr9528 (GitHub) / WolfDK (Discord / Steam) / WolfDK1996 (Age of Empire). 
 
## Description 
 
Multiplies the effectiveness of relics by 5. 
If the effect would be at or above 100%, it will only be 95%, as a number of relics bugs out the game somewhat at 100%+. 
 
Some relics might not display their altered effect (e.g Ochre Whip Of Shennong), cause they have a custom description. I have however checked, and it seems that they do appear to have altered effect. 
 
Has Cross-compatibility with my Trainable Relics. 
 
The Mod is an Additive Data Mod, so it should be compatible with any other 'techtree' altering mod. 
If some other mod changes the relics effects, prior to this loading, then relics might end up with additional effects. 
 
## Issues 
 
Should any issues be found, fell free to create an issue on the GitHub Page <https://github.com/andr9528/Retold-Mods>. 
 
If you find that one or more relics does not appear to be affected by this mod, then those relics might 
 
1. Be newer than this mod. 
2. Be added by some other mod you have. 
3. Be missed by me. 
 
In any case, do let me know, and i will see if i can add them to this.

This Japanese map pack features three weather-themed maps:

Seto Rainlands - Shallow currents of water run through the map, bringing opportunities for fish and naval combat, while still allowing your armies to traverse on foot. Take control of the shallow waters through a combination of men, myth and ships.  Play on Regicide Mode for a custom regent, Abe-no-Seimei.  Also features a custom King-of-the-Hill mode.

Seto Rainlands (Frozen) - Frozen rivers of water run through the map, they cannot be built on and provide no options for fishing or naval combat.  Perfect for those who dislike water maps.  Play on Regicide Mode for a custom regent, Abe-no-Seimei.  Also features a custom King-of-the-Hill mode.

Hokkaido Mountains - This mountainous map features many cliffs that cut through the landscape creating defensive opportunities and a more random layout. Navigate through the many random snow covered cliffs to defeat your opponents.  Play on Regicide mode for a custom Regent, Yuki-onna.  Also features a custom King-of-the-Hill mode.

Retold Atlantean (Testing)

Welcome to my most ambitious project to date - a full fledged multiplayer action RPG experience supporting up to 10 players. This map is fully online compatible with other players with no requirements to install any other mods.

CUSTOMISE 
Pick a character from one of 3 classes - Ranged, Melee, or Caster. Choose a gender and profile to customise your experience. Each of the classes offers a large skill tree of different abilities and passives to explore. 
 
DISCOVER 
Explore randomly generated levels completing branching quests, discovering chests and shrines, and of course lots of gold and loot! Gold and loot is instanced and tailed to your character class so no worries about stealing other people's gold and items. Grab loot to your heart's content. 
 
INTERACT 
Speak and interact with characters, explore some buildings, and play minor minigames breaking up the normal gameplay. Beware that some interactions may have different outcomes between different plays keeping even seasoned players on their toes. 
 
HOSTING INSTRUCTIONS 
This map is in the form of a random map rather than a scenario allowing for variable player count. When hosting ensure to set the player count to be two greater than the number of human players and ensure the last two players are set to NO AI. e.g. if hosting by yourself host with 3 players with players 2 and 3 set to NO AI. 
 
Please note that due to the current heavy use of advanced custom UIs that controllers are not currently supported and will leave the players soft locked - a mouse is currently required to play. Console players are supported providing they use a mouse. 
 
TROUBLESHOOTING 
If your character gets stuck or there are issues with a player going AFK use the pray option to rescue you. After selecting an option you need to stand still for 30 seconds for the effect to activate otherwise it will be cancelled. This should only be used if you get truly stuck.

DISCUSSIONS AND FEEDBACK
Come and join in the discussion and provide feedback on my Discord chanel: https://discord.gg/c2bCGNJ6Rp

Are you bummed that the devs went the extra mile in Retold to make models for dwarf ragnarok heroes, but that dwarf villagers still transform into generic human berserk(er)s ? Look no further: they have arrived, angry and tattooed, bearing sharp axes!
This mods adds special dwarf berserker visuals that villager dwarfs turn into, with a unique portrait, skins for each upgrade, including the weapon upgrades from the armoury ! This mod's aim is ONLY COSMETIC in nature, this "new" unit being literally identical to a human berserk gameplay-wise : same cost, receives the same buffs from the same techs upgrading regular berserkers, and shares the same selection group. 
For those among you wanting to go the "full dwarf" route, 2 norse Major Gods out of the 4, Thor and Freyr, being good dwarf-friends (or rather "good dwarf-customers" really), have them unlocked in the longhouse, at the same training cost and time as regular berserkers. Thor even starts with one and they replace regular berserkers in his town centers. The norse AI players WILL recruit them and pit them against you !

DISCLAIMER: 
Despite my best efforts, this mod may possibly conflict and not play properly when paired with: 
- mods that modify the base game's "hero of ragnarok (dwarf)" model (specifically the ".material" file)
- mods that add units to the longhouse and/or the town/village/citadel center
- (less likely) mods that rework the archaic age parameters for Thor and Freyr
- (also minor detail) mods that tweak Thor's starting roster (you might not get the intended number/units)
The mod works in multiplayer if ALL players in the party have the mod downloaded and enabled.

If you encounter unexpected issues or have suggestions, do not hesitate to let me know on the mod discussion page on the official AoE website! (Once on the mod page, the "discuss this mod" button is below the mod description and above the review section.) With this in mind: 

KNOWN ISSUES & OTHER FUTURE PLANS: 
- No hotkeys yet: As of now (oct. 2025), modding new keybindings/shortcuts is not yet "additive", meaning it cannot reliably be made compatible with other mods. To keep this mod as compatible and broadly usable as is possible, I have chosen to wait for keybind compatibility before adding this part to the mod.
- Thor still starts with 5 regular berserkers instead of dwarf ones on deathmatch: Yeah I literally couldn't figure this one out yet without it having unintended and strange side effects, so the human zerkers will have to do ... for now!
- This mod is only cosmetic in nature, and will remain so. But I'd like to create a complementing submod that actually makes dwarf berserkers distinct from human ones, with different stats and different use, for those who want that kind of dwarf flavour. This requires reflexion, thus time... we'll see what the future holds! 

Have fun playing! :)

-----

Mod changelog: mMoksha’s Redesign of AoM Retold

    Hello! :D This is mMoksha333. This mod is a heavy redesign of the gameplay by tweaking a lot of values such as doubling the HP, damage and cost of myth units and making buildings a lot stronger. I made a list of changes contained in a file called changelog.txt within this mod's folder.

    Here are the most noteworthy changes:
        - Myth unit HP, damage and cost doubled.
        - All damage multipliers have been halved across the board.
        - Villager build limit is now 80 and caravan build limit is now 45.
        - Heroic and mythic age eco upgrades increase gather rate by 10% only instead of 15%/20% respectively.
        - All atlantean heroes except citizen heroes have had their pop count doubled, meaning that heroizing units while full pop will put You beyond pop maximum, but prevent training any new units until You go back below pop max, quite like in EE or vanilla AoM.
        - Heavy and champion upgrades as well as armory upgrades have been reworked to increase HP more substantially and damage somewhat less, resulting in more durable units and longer fights.
        - Archaic age, classical age and heroic age greek heroes have a build limit of 2 instead of 1.
        - All static defensive buildings and fortifications have been tweaked to be made stronger and more durable, but also more limited and strategical. Masons, Architects and Advanced Fortifications have been reworked.
        - All human units now have 95% crush armor.
        - Siege units have increased crush armor at 90% for ranged siege and 95% for melee siege to heavily limit siege wars.
        - And a few more things! ;) 

    This is not meant to be balanced precisely. It is a mod intended for fun. I will be playing it with friends vs the AI for the most part, as that's what I made it for. I plan to update this mod to some extent, although the groundwork has been done and I'm not sure how much more I'll change it.

    I hope You enjoy this mod, have fun!

Super Villager is a custom unit mod for Age of Mythology: Retold that introduces a brand-new, overpowered villager unit you can train directly from your Town Center.

This villager is not “balanced” it’s intentionally crazy and fun.
It gathers resources much faster, moves quicker, has higher HP, can fight (both melee and ranged), and can build almost every structure in the Greek tech tree. You can create up to 5 Super Villagers, and each one costs resources to train but once you get them, you basically have a god-tier workforce with real combat potential.

This mod is meant purely for fun and chaos try weird strategies, economic rushes, or even surprise attacks by using villagers as fighters.

This is my very first mod for Age of Mythology: Retold.
I hope you enjoy it and I’m open to feedback and ideas to make it better!

Features:

Trained at Town Center

Fast resource gathering (food/wood/gold)

High HP and solid armor values

Ranged + melee attack

Can build most buildings

Limited to 5 units

If you like it, feel free to comment, give suggestions, or request updates.
Have fun breaking the meta!

modName: Endgameable Wonder 终局性能奇观
description:
<Additive mod> 
Sometimes want to grind more meat for fun, but don't like to affect normal gameplay? 
Here's a solution and still ensure the game is endable~ 
=========↓↓↓↓↓========= 
Wonders can be built multiple times, with its power grow more and more invincible. 
 
The first wonder provide almost the same bouns for you in the original game, it also cost cheaper and can be built much faster, act as a dropoff point for every resource and block enemy godpower around. 
However, it has lower stat and grant vision for all players just like other AOE game for other players to snipe it down. 
In addition, wonder age will produce every unit/building/tech in 2x speed, except economy unit, the logic is to use the economy to let you brake naturally. To compensate for this, villigers will move a bit faster, suitable for building and repairing stuff. 
All town center will unlock areaheal ability, and all abilities relate to heal and repair is double effect, make sure healing is still a thing in immense fight. 
 
From the 2nd wonder, the wonder cost will pump up drastically, 
Each wonder you built in addition will grant stat below:(Stacked) 
①40% of godpower cooldown reduction, and for this modification, the first wonder will also only give you 40% instead of 75%, which means if you build the 3rd wonder, the cooldown will be shorter than the original discount. 
②30 more population, and generate 2/s for every resource and 1/s for favor. 
③6/s of healing effect for the town center's areaheal ability. 
④1/s regen for every building. 
⑤50% of building damage bouns for every unit, up to 200%. 
⑥80% damage increase for defence buildings and +2 maxrange, +8 build limit for towers and +2 for fortresses. 
 
If you still can't finish the game, just build the 5th wonder! Its extremly expensive! 
You will ascend to demi-god, grant you free will to use any godpower,legend beings and titan gate for an insane discount. Still kind of balance I guess? Since it is limited by your favor stock. 
Also all myth tech's effect will be doubled in the state. 
How could mortal stop this kind of inevitable force? 
=========↑↑↑↑↑========= 
 
Feedback: najizhimo@gmail.com 
Searching my ID for more funny mods. 
 
<兼容性模组> 
不想影响正常的游戏体验，但有时又想为了乐趣而绞肉？  
这里有一个解决方案，同时还能确保游戏可以结束~  
=========↓↓↓↓↓=========  
奇观可以多次建造，其提供的力量会越来越强大，最终变得无法阻挡。  
 
第一个奇观为你提供和原版几乎相同的奖励，而且成本更低，建造速度也更快，同时可以让村民存放任何资源并阻止周围的敌对神力。  
然而，它的属性较低，且和其它帝国时代游戏一样会将自己的视野共享给所有玩家，方便被其它玩家狙击奇观。  
此外，奇迹时代将以2倍的速度生产每个单位/建筑/科技，除了经济单位，其逻辑是利用经济让你自然减速。村民的移速会增加，更适合修建和维修建筑。  
所有城镇中心都将解锁区域治疗能力，所有与治疗和维修相关的能力都将产生双倍效果，确保在激烈的绞肉过程中治疗依然发挥作用。  
 
从第二座奇观开始，奇观成本将急剧上升，  
你建造的每个额外奇观都将获得以下属性加成：（可叠加）  
①神力冷却时间减少40%，为了适配调整，第一个奇观也仅减少40%而非75%，这意味着你建造到第三个奇观时，神力冷却时间将比原先的折扣时间更短。  
②人口增加30，并且每秒生成2点所有资源和1点信仰。  
③城镇中心区域治疗能力的治疗效果提升6/s。  
④每座建筑每秒恢复1点血量。  
⑤每个单位获得50%的建筑伤害加成，最高可达200%。  
⑥80%防御建筑伤害且射程+2,+8塔/+2堡垒建造限制。 
 
如果你还是无法结束游戏，那就尝试建造第五个奇观吧！它非常昂贵！  
你将晋升为半神，赋予你自由使用任何神力、传奇生物和泰坦之门的权利，并且享受逆天的折扣。 
不过，应该估计还算平衡？因为它毕竟受到你的恩惠储备的限制。  
此外，在该状态下，所有神话科技的效果都将加倍。  
凡人如何能阻挡这种无穷的力量？  
=========↑↑↑↑↑========= 
 
反馈: najizhimo@gmail.com

This is a port of the EE Battle Royale preserving the feel of the gameplay and map design.

Spawn on the map at a location of your choosing and explore and pick up relics to receive powerful units and god powers. Additionally collect wood and gold to build defences and spawn additional relic rewards.

Beware however as over time the map starts shrinking bringing players closer and closer together. Destroy the hero villager of another player to eliminate them and win!

HOSTING NOTE
Due to a current limitation in the game engine regarding the updating of the lava terrain in the fog I have had to code up a workaround that requires the last player to be an AI player. When hosting ensure to add an additional dummy AI player in the last slot. If I find a way around the limitation that does not need a spare AI player I will remove this requirement.

FEEDBACK AND DISCUSSION
Join my Discord to discuss this and other maps: https://discord.gg/c2bCGNJ6Rp

Usually tripples the strength of relics. Also sprinkles on-theme bonuses to relics and strengthens Oracle Heroes. Why Oracle Heroes? They where much more useless in AoM Extended Edition, and this is a spiritual port of that mod.

Features:
Soldiers and Villagers take x5 crush damage (94% instead of 99%)
Myth Units take x1.5 crush damage (70% instead of 80% for most)
Relics x3 strength
Oracle Heroes get stronger with relics

Sadly, despite trying to patch it for Ancient Pillars and Heavenly Spear, I'm unable to change those relics to be tripple strength (though the 10hp/s wall relic was disgusting without buffs)

Complaints, tips, or recommendations can be sent to Timtam4815

modName: Neat Main Menu, Neat Skirmish Page and Neat Map Picker by Mathilde
description:
Hi! 😊 This mods turns the main menu from a misshapen mess into a four-section, two-column neat main menu! I've also reworked the singleplayer skirmish page and the map picker pop-up.

For the main menu: At the top You'll find the two buttons for Skirmish and multiplayer. Below that are the buttons for loading saves and for watching replays. Below still are the community event box and the three buttons for campaign, arena of the gods and continue. And at the bottom is the daily celestial challenge frame and next to it the rewards progress box.

For the singleplayer skirmish page: I moved the game type and victory condition to the right panel with all the other game settings. I also entirely removed the now empty top panel. Unfortunely this does not change the multiplier lobby page. It is a different page and because it contains additional elements like the invite player button, I cannot copy the layout 1 for 1. I may edit the multiplayer lobby page at a later date, maybe.

For the map picker: I widened the pop-up a lot and resized the map icons in it. Now it displays 6 maps per row instead of 4, and 3 full rows instead of 2 rows and a cut-off third of a row. This makes it much easier to navigate and scroll.

modName: New Turkic Major God - Goddess Umay
description:
<additive mod> 
Version 0.9.0 
 
Umay is the first comprehensive Turkic mythology mod for Age of Mythology: Retold. 
 
This mod brings a long-missing mythological culture into the game, offering players a unique perspective inspired by ancient Turkic beliefs, history, and warrior traditions. Umay blends both historical and legendary elements to give the AoM universe a fresh cultural layer. 
 
Developed over approximately 45–50 hours of reverse engineering, testing, audio design, visual production, and data exploration, the Umay Mod introduces a new major god, several minor gods, 20 Turkic-themed units, over 100 new voice lines, new god powers, and custom visual assets.  
 
New Major God – Turkic Goddess Umay 
Umay is the benevolent Turkic goddess associated with protection, fertility, and life. Selecting Umay grants access to new minor gods, special bonuses, and a gameplay experience rooted in Turkic culture.  
 
New Units  
The mod adds 20 fully voiced Turkic-themed units, built on top of Norse templates.  
 
Fully Turkish voice lines for select, move, attack, death, and grunts  
 
Names and voice lines inspired by Turkic culture  
 
Unit parameters such as cost, attack, and training time are currently kept close to vanilla to maintain balance, and will be customizable based on community feedback  
 
Why Are These Units Added to the Norse Civilization?  
 
Currently, Age of Mythology: Retold does not allow modders to create entirely new civilizations. For this reason, Turkic units are added on top of the existing Norse civ.  
 
There is also a thematic reason: ancient Turkic and Norse cultures share surprising similarities, including nomadic warrior traditions, social structures, shamanistic beliefs, and survival-focused lifestyles. This made the Norse roster the most meaningful and lore-consistent foundation for implementing Turkic units while keeping gameplay functional and familiar.  
 
Over 100 New Voice Lines  
The mod includes more than 100 new voice lines for all units. 
 
Combat lines, death sounds, gathering and villager lines  
 
Unique vocal styles for special units such as Erlik units  
 
AI-generated prototype voices and professional male & female recordings  
 
This is the first AoM mod to provide fully Turkish voice-over for an entire unit roster  
 
4 New God Powers  
The mod introduces four new god powers inspired by Turkic mythology:  
 
Powers generating resources over time  
 
Abilities that summon unique creatures  
 
Spy powers  
 
Special late-game combinations such as Tengri’s Eye + Inferno All god powers are balance-ready and will evolve with player feedback.  
 
New Building – The Otag  
A new building, the Otag, has been added: Provides 12 population Symbolizes the traditional Turkic command tent Will receive more visual detail in future updates (Turkic ornaments, banners, etc.)  
 
Custom Visual Design (AI-Enhanced)  
All icons and visual assets were designed using AI tools combined with manual refinement.  
 
Major & minor god portraits  
 
God power icons  
 
Cultural visual motifs UI elements adapted to the AoM visual style  
 
Future updates aim to replace 3D unit models with fully Turkic-inspired designs.  
 
Known Issues & Future Improvements  
The mod is still under active development.  
Current known issues include:  
Some missing or incorrect icons  
Occasional voice mismatches  
Planned improvements:  
Full naval voice-over  
Turkic-themed 3D units  
Better-balanced god powers  
Additional upgrades, technologies, and visual polish

A Custom Campaign that I've made back in AOMEE. This remake polishes the original version in every shape and form, and offers a unique experience while staying true to the RTS genre.
This Campaign offers 4 voiced playable maps and 5 cinematics for a total of 9 scenarios. The final product will have 20 scenarios (10 maps and their 11 respective cinematics).

- Modified Units and encounters, such as a gigantic colossus that regenerates and has a big HP pool.

- A complete revamp of gameplay that offers new mechanics and adapts to Retold's modern style and pushing the editor to its potential.

Join Darkantos's Journey in 10 unique voiced maps to discover the mysteries behind this divine intervention and the secrets that lie beyond.

Hello everyone,

I've always felt that, even though the game is about gods, they have very little presence during actual gameplay. Sure, they grant powers, units, and technologies, but apart from advancing ages, you rarely get to see them.

I thought of a simple, non-invasive way to bring them more into focus: replacing the images of the god powers themselves.

My first attempt was compatible with any mod, as it simply replaced the icon paths. However, being a data mod, it didn’t work well with multiplayer or the daily challenge. So I switched to a more targeted approach: replacing the power icons one by one.

So here you have, enjoy!

V1.1
Added Demeter, Pan, Hestia and Persephone

ADDITIVE MOD (Changelog at the end)

DEPENDENCY: This mod is an extension to my other mod LegendsUnlocked. In the priority order, LegendsExtended must be on top of LegendsUnlocked.

This means: If your LegendsUnlocked priority is 4, LegendsExtended must be 3, 2 or 1.

WARNING: It is not possible yet to properly add Legends to AotG. I tried and some other modders tried and the best we achieved was to modify existing ones. So this mod DOES NOT add Legend to the Legend Selection panel in Gauntlet!
 
. --- What the mod does? 
 
Adds extra Legends to be trained in the Shrine provided from LegendsUnlocked. The Legends are variants of the campaign heroes and they have the same attributes. This means they weren't balanced --just like some Legends are the exact same as their Hero version-- and some may be overpowered, such as Melagius, Ornlu, Shuten or Arkantos.

. --- Why arkantos?

Well... well... well...

. --- Will you balance the extra Legends in the future?

I plan to release one last Legends mod to rework all Legends. I'll make my best to rebalance and add some uniqueness to the Legends.

About balancing Legends to fit this mod specifically I'm not very sure.



To report bugs or ask for update, notify me writing to the user andregabriel7011 in the "Age of Empires" Official Discord channel



SPECIAL THANKS

. Duxblah
. Eskiss
. Serp
. Slush
. Thanik
. and the whole modding community :D

CHANGELOG

1.0.1: Added a better explanation of how to ensure LegendsExtended is loading on top of LegendsUnlocked

modName: Better AI Scaling - Extra AI compatible version
description:
Compatible version with Extra AI mod from Garbhus (v14.7). Put Better AI Scaling before Extra AI in load order.

 

Install if you are tired on games with more than two players to see the ai with lowest difficulties (standard, moderate, hard) struggle because capped for two players only.


What does this mod do ?


Short answer : the AI (standard, moderate, hard) scale far better in games with more players since it is not capped for party of only two players.


Long answer : go lookat my github repo for explanations and charts https://github.com/vg11k/aomr-betteraiscaling


 


The AI now may rush a bit (a lot) on free TC it sees. Also it may build wonders later since it is spending more for military.


Feel free to ping me on the #myth-modding channel in the official AoE discord if you have questions.


Enjoy.
