modName: Age of Mythology Divine Edition PreAlpha
description:
The beginning of Age of Mythology: Divine Edition on Retold!

This mod promises to add many new cultures, from the Romans to the Celts to the Lakota to even Lovecraft's pantheon. It also will add new major gods, such that every civilization has six major gods to pick from.

Currently, the Norse and Japanese are done, and the Romans are in pre-alpha. This adds eleven new major gods and fifteen new minor gods. 

~~~~
THE ASSETS USED ARE PLACEHOLDERS AND DO NOT REPRESENT THE FINISHED PRODUCT
THIS IS BEING RELEASED IN ITS EARLIEST PLAYABLE STATE
EXPECT BUGS, EXPLOITS, AND AN OVERALL LACK OF VISUAL POLISH
BALANCE WILL TAKE TIME TO ACHIEVE, DO NOT EXPECT COMPETITIVE-READY GODS WITHOUT SIGNIFICANT PLAYTESTING
~~~~

If you have comments/criticism/suggestions, especially regarding balance or bugs, please reach out to me on discord. 

Known issues:
* If you go to the editor and back repeatedly, the god list can get corrupted.
* The AI cannot play Roman gods.
* The main techtree crashes if you try to open it.

Reginleifs Rally but you are Gargarensis! 
Mission 1 of the Mythical Battles campaign 
 
This time, you play as Gargarensis, battling Reginleif, who serves and worships Odin, alongside Niordsir and his clan, loyal followers of Freyr. 
 
This mission is a collaboration between myself and Vamierez Without Him The Scenario wouldn't Be Nearly as Polished as it is I created the foundation, and he refined it with a number of quality of life improvements and gameplay adjustments that make the experience smoother and more polished overall. 
 
Hope you all enjoy this one! 
 
I'm Hoping to Upload More Reversed Campaign Missions in the Future 
 
 
HOW TO PLAY THIS SCENARIO 
 
IMPORTANT: 
• This scenario is played through the in-game Editor. 
• It does NOT appear in Skirmish or Custom Scenario menus Correctly. 
 
STEP 1 – PLACE THE SCENARIO FILE 
 
1. Subscribe to this mod from the Mod Browser. 
2. Close the game completely. 
 
3. Open: 
   Windows (C:) → Users → <Your Username> → Games → Age of Mythology Retold → <Your Steam ID> → mods → subscribed 
 
4. Open the folder that starts with numbers and contains: 
   mythical battles reversed 
 
5. Open the "scenario" folder. 
 
6. Copy: 
   Gargarensis’ Rally.mythscn 
 
7. Paste it into: 
   Windows (C:) → Users → <Your Username> → Games → Age of Mythology Retold → <Your Steam ID> → scenario 
 
STEP 2 – PLAY THE SCENARIO IN THE EDITOR 
 
8. Launch Age of Mythology: Retold. 
 
9. At the main menu, click the three-line menu (≡) in the top-right corner and select "Editor". 
 
10. In the Editor, click "File" (top-left) → "Load Scenario". 
 
11. Make sure The Button in the Bottom right located above the button "Open"  "Load In-Game Asset Scenarios" is OFF 
 
12. Select Gargarensis’ Rally.mythscn and click "Open". 
 
13. Click "Scenario" (top menu) → "Playtest Scenario". 
 
14. Choose your desired difficulty level → Click "OK". 
 
Enjoy!

Paste them into: Windows (C:) → Users → → Games → Age of Mythology Retold → → scenario STEP 2 PLAY THE CAMPAIGN IN THE EDITOR 8. Launch Age of Mythology: Retold. 9. At the main menu, click the three-line menu (≡) in the top-right corner and select "Editor". 10. In the Editor, click "File" (top-left) → "Load Scenario". 11. Make sure The Button in the Bottom right located above the button "Open" "Load In-Game Asset Scenarios" is OFF 12. Select The Mission you wish to play and click "Open". 13. Click "Scenario" (top menu) → "Playtest Scenario". 14. Choose your desired difficulty level → Click "OK". Enjoy!

Welcome to the Crucible - the ultimate test of endurance and strategy. Team up with up to 10 other friends and face rounds of enemies attacks trying to take down the central tree.

Start in the map centre building up a defensive base and choose a perk with every age up including the initial. Then explore the map for further resources and side objectives. Complete these objectives to gain powerful ingame bonuses to help you survive longer.

At the game end your performance will be ranked with badge and survival time so you can brag to others.

For those wanting to experiment the game features an option screen allowing customisation of the map biome set, lighting, and difficulty settings.

Currently controllers are not currently supported - mouse and keyboard only. Support may be added in the future in which case I will update this description to say so.

Good luck out there! To host have any number of players but ensure the last slot is set to No AI.

Infinite population too infinite?
With this mod, population is soft capped by the need to still build houses.

ADDITIVE MOD (CHANGELOG at the end)
 
DEPENDENCY: This mod is an extension to my other mods LegendsExtended and LegendsUnlocked. In the priority order, LegendsReworked must be on top of LegendsExtended and LegendsExtended must be on top of LegendsUnlocked. 
 
This means: If your LegendsUnlocked priority is 4, LegendsExtended must be 3 and LegendsReworked must be 2. 
 
 
. What the mod does? 
 
Reworks all Legends from Arena of The Gods and all Legends from LegendsExtended. They were balanced to be more unique and useful instead of simply just another hero. Powerful Legends didn't get buffed much. 
 
All aspects of the Legends were reworked, from Hitpoints to Damage. 
 
Here I'll briefly list each Legend's uniqueness: 
 
. Kastor: Frequent Huge Lifesteal Ability with Brief ROF and Lifesteal Boost 
. Gargarensis: Great Selfheal Ability with Resistance Buffs 
. Circe: Curse Ability + AoE Instead of Chain hits 
. Kamos: SelfHeal Ability with Brief Damage Boost 
. Amanra: Lifesteal Ability with ROF Buff with Slow and Hack Resistance Debuff 
. Theris: Frequent Selfheal Ability with Slow 
. Setna: Powerfully Empower Units + Provides A Lot of Favor (Cast using the ability instead of rightclicking) 
. Reginleif: Immense Damage, LOS and Range on First Hit with Debuffs and Self Debuffs

Welcome to Pandoras Box 2! The new S-Tier tournament.

Featuring 11 previously released maps, now completely reimagined and rebuilt from scratch — refined to deliver maximum competitive intensity and deeper strategic gameplay. Welcome to a new chapter of competitive play.

Note: Restarting the game is necessary after updating the mod for the custom global illuminations to be injected correctly.

BUG REPORT GUIDE:

After finishing the match:

Go to your Age of Mythology: Retold documents folder.

  • If you don’t know the exact path, follow these steps:
  • Open the game and go to Skirmish.
  • Under Game Type (where you see options like Deathmatch, Standard, or Lightning), select Custom Scenario.
  • An in-game file browser window will open.
  • Click Open Directory.


This will open the game folder in Windows Explorer.
From there:

  1. Go one folder back to see all your AOM folders.
  2. Then go one more folder back.
  3. Open the folder named Temp.
  4. Then open Logs.
  5. Open MythLog.
  6. Press CTRL + B to open the text search (Notepad).
  7. Type MAP CODE and navigate to the last occurrence in the file.
    • If the last one says 'none', use the second-to-last entry instead.
    • If searching through the file feels tedious, scroll all the way to the bottom and use F3 to search upward from the end.
  • You will find a line similar to this:
  • MAP CODE: '0/frozen_wastes_boreal_snowfield_pb2_edition_3_7.xs/13921/2/1/1/2/2/7/1/0/0/0/1/1/4/1/0/1'

Copy the entire line and send it to me via private message on Discord, or post it in Boit’s Discord under Pandora’s Box 2 → pb2-feedback, along with a description of the issue.

If no match configuration details are specified, it will be assumed the game was played under default settings (1v1 Supremacy). Anyway, the lines after the seed identify it for me.

This map code allows me to generate the exact same seed in which you experienced the issue, enabling me to properly debug and identify the problem using development tools.

DISCLAIMER:

Some maps use custom global lighting.
This does not affect compatibility or gameplay, but it may impact the visual experience for players who do not have the mod installed.

Players without the mod may notice issues such as excessive fog (e.g. the Gorge map) or divine power lighting effects (e.g. Fimbulwinter or Inferno) persisting after the power has ended. Players with the mod installed will see the maps as intended.

This happens because custom lighting is injected via triggers, allowing the maps to compile and remain playable for users without the mod. Using hardcoded custom lighting would instead require all players to install the mod, effectively making map transfers obsolete.

As maps are updated, their version numbers are also updated (e.g. Gorge 3.6 → Gorge 3.7).

Before playing, make sure the latest version of the map is selected, especially if the host is using a transferred map file instead of the version provided by the mod.

Please note that the most recent version of each map is always the one that will be taken into account for the tournament.
This allows me to properly track any potential issues and apply balance adjustments if needed.

This is a small update to fix a bug related to Mission 9, as well as some slight difficulty adjustments. Also, more scenarios are planned!

Aainiikkusu's Challenges is pack of custom scenarios with unique challenges that you can access directly from the Campaign menu, under Custom Campaigns. None of the missions are based on legends, myths or historical events, and do not have any implication in any lore. The missions are a work of pure imagination and are more focused on gameplay. Many hundred hours went into creating and testing those, so if you like it, please let me know by giving 5 starts to this scenario pack!

Features 
- 12 new scenarios (2 for each pantheon!)
- Custom AI tailored to each scenario
- All scenarios available from the start; play in any order!

Additional notes
- This mod makes minor additions and modifications to data files. Although it shouldn't conflict with other mods, it will stop you from playing certain game modes, such as Multiplayer or Daily Challenge. If you want to play one of these game modes, you will need to disable this mod first.
- The scenarios were developed with the Premium Edition; you may encounter issues if you attempt to play without a certain DLC installed.
- If you encounter any bugs or issues, or have any comments, contact me on Discord at "aainiikkusu"

Special thanks to
- MrMobiL
- Arkantos

For personal use (non-additive mod)  
  
I love Age of Mythology but there are some things which bugs me out. So I decided to mod some stuff.   
  
Changes in this mod:   
- Doubled unit and building HP so fights are taking definitely longer  
- Units now take 50 % more time to train  
- Defensive buildings, naval units and flying units deal 2x damage  
- Reworked siege ships now fire rocks instead of arrows - more damage, splash damage, but reduced attack speed and only 50 % damage against close combat ships such as pentekonters. Atlanteans and Japanese can reverse these change by researching certain god powers  
- Cheaper god powers (reduced cost by 25 %) and also deal double damage to balance out the higher HP

Update 1:
- Increased the size of ships, especially transport ships
- Drastically reduced the turn rate of ships 

Update 2:
- Removed additional damage scaling for garrisoned units in sentry towers and fortress, as there was a misunderstanding on my side (it was already ingame)
- Added demeter units to the mod

Beloved FWG has received a new map!

Food Wood Gold is 3vs3 PvP scenario where each team member gathers 1 resource and shares it with whole team. Less focus on economic fidely, and more fighting.

Food Wood Gold is intended to provide longer PvP games where skill doesn't matter as much (Just do your best!) due to rocking rapid economic growth with defensible positions. Teleportation godpowers and flying units are randomized each game and refunded with ones from different civilization.

Fort Unknown has teams holding defensible positions, while also providing plenty of space between teams so they can contest resources available.

Whetever you like to sneak attacks from side gate like a ninja, take control of map early or boom to become overlord that marches out of gates to slay the heathens like a boss you are, Fort Unknown offers it all.

The map is somewhat randomly generated, so there is variety from game to game.

I always wanted to imagine the Atlantean major gods as primordial forces, rather than humanoid gods or rock monsters. 
So for this reason I - with some help from my friend, AI - created proper major god portraits for them. 
I know they are not perfect, and the use of AI is recognizable, but personally I don't have the tim or the knowledge to create something like this on my own. 
I share the portraits with you, so anyone else who likes these portraits can use them. :)

Pick your role as either a Runner or Hunter at game start with the game adjusting based on player count for each side and complete the following objective based on the side you picked:

RUNNER:
Hide and build defences around the map to survive until the time limit to geta chance to fight back against the hunters. Build walls, towers, and sky passage. Use timeshifting tand make use of map chokepoints to help survive.

HUNTERS
Massive large armies to hunt down and destroy the runners before they get a chance to fight back. Better units will unlock over time each with ranmoised stats and a random trait boosting a particular stat.

Upgrades are available for both teams with discounts for bulk buying to be bought with food gathered passively, via farming, and destruction of units and buildings of the other team.

To swing the game god powers are also available for purchase for both teams from a random pool for each side mixing up the gameplay. Use these to your advantage to surprise the other team.

Host instructions: Host with any number of human players - no AI players required. Controls are currently not supported on this map so please ensure you have a mouse on hand to play.

Auto mode: Add in AI players to activate auto mode to play against the AI hunters (You will be a runner automatically).

To give feedback and join discussions please join my Discord: https://discord.gg/m6VX5DWdWD

modName: God icons as powers: FlavioJC anime pack
description:
Hello everyone, 
 
I've always felt that, even though the game is about gods, they have very little presence during actual gameplay. Sure, they grant powers, units, and technologies, but apart from advancing ages, you rarely get to see them. 
 
I thought of a simple, non-invasive way to bring them more into focus: replacing the images of the god powers themselves. 
 
My first attempt was compatible with any mod, as it simply replaced the icon paths. However, being a data mod, it didn’t work well with multiplayer or the daily challenge. So I switched to a more targeted approach: replacing the power icons one by one. 
 
This mod enables FlavioJC's AI anime portraits as your Icon Powers. He granted permission for uploading this. 
 
So here you have, enjoy!

Version 1.1
Added Demeter Pack

Quality of life changes for Demeter DLC 
 
Hamadryad Tree form now cannot be moved thus preventing accidental transformation by moving them. They instead have an ability that will tranform them back into Hamadryad form. 
 
Communal Hearth ability range indicator, Siren basic attack and Lykaon tranformation tweak all are adressed by the developers. So I am removing those parts to prevent confict.

Hades's elite human unit, the Gastraphetoros, is underwelming in open field battles, being surpassed by the Toxotes in critical stats like damage/population and damage/cost. This means that Toxotes bring more value than Gastraphetoros in a field battle, relegating the elite unit to be only effective at sieges.

This mod overhauls the Gastraphetoros to become the elite archer is should be, bringing massive value in the battle and finally outperforming the Toxotes.

In ancient Greece the gastraphetes, precursor of catapults and crossbows, was a cumbersome but powerful weapon that was difficult to reload but had the highest range and power of all hand-held ranged weapons of the time. The heavy bolt was capable of penetrating the armors of the time, rendering protection useless.
This mod adds Divine Damage to the unit to simulate the armor-piercing capabilities of this powerful weapon.

NEW STATS
++++++++
Pierce Damage: 16
Divine Damage: 2
Rate of Fire: 2.1
Range: 23
No bonuses

modName: The Forgotten Ones: Amazons and Griffins
description:
The Forgotten Ones: Amazons and Griffins

The Forgotten Ones: Amazons and Griffins is a compact mod adding Amazon and Griffin units to the Greek pantheon.

Amazon Cavalry

Amazon Cavalry is a ranged cavalry unit available at the Fortress in the Heroic Age, good against both infantry and ranged units. The Amazon Cavalry continues to fight as infantry when dismounted. Amazons have their own line upgrades, from Medium to Champion Amazons.

Griffin

Griffins are powerful myth units available at the Temple in the Mythic Age, who are able to fly. While they can't attack when flying, when on the ground they can leap into battle causing high damage to the targeted unit. When upgraded to Elder Griffins gain an additional special attack.

No trails behind projectiles like arrows, ballista bolts and catapult shots.

Also changes burning pitch flame effect for more realistic one.

This map also features my beta mod which grants Myth Units and technologies at the Wonder from similar Gods of other cultures. It is recommended to play this map with Age of Mythology Divine Edition PreAlpha.

A port of the Vassal Mode from AoE4 - Similar to Regicide; instead of being defeated, players become allied to the player who killed their Lord unit, with penalties for being a Vassal.

 - This version is based on the Land Unknown map and can be hosted in combination with other game modes, including King of the Hill and Regicide.
 - Host on FFA for easy setup; the map enforces FFA at the start with locked teams.
 - Each player starts with a Lord unit (Theocrat) and upon losing their Lord unit they become a Vassal to the player who killed it.  Players with a Star next to their name in the Diplomacy menu still have their Lord unit.

Penalties for becoming a Vassal:
 - The Vassal Military units are destroyed upon losing their Lord unit.
 - All but 1 of their Town Centers are converted to their new Overlord.
 - Defeated Lord units drop a Relic.
 - Every 60 seconds a Vassal automatically tributes 30% of resources exceeding: 2400 Food, 1200 Wood, 1200 Gold, and 75 Favor (increased on Deathmatch).


Join the [DoD] Clan Discord for discussion and feedback on the map: https://discord.com/invite/NwXeNmxs5R

MCMT Mod for Age of Mythology: Retold 
Author: Akinizer 
 
DESCRIPTION 
The MCMT Mod is a comprehensive modification for Age of Mythology: Retold, introducing a vast array of new units, buildings, technologies, and powers, while also enhancing existing game content across all civilizations. Experience new legendary heroes, powerful mythical beasts, advanced siege weaponry, unique economic units, and much more. This mod aims to expand strategic options and provide a fresh gameplay experience with featuring folk stories, scifi and legends... 
 
FEATURES 

New Content: 
Legendary Heroes Arrived and Returned: 
Landlord: A versatile hero that constructs special buildings and preserves unique passive buffs, that is available at Town Center as the MCMT origin unit 
Conan: A powerful warrior with access to multiple god powers. 
Matsuri Yurio & Matsuri Azula: Psionic heroes with unique transformation and Superpowers. 
Achilles Dismounted: The hero Achilles now steps on foot as it leaves his fallen horse Bailus behind to display the true face of a demigod 

Elite Heroes & Warriors: 
Farseer: Airborne Pharaohs that can shoot fireballs! 
Chieftain: Powerful Hero Kuafu with special buildings and lots of tech benefits 
Hitman: Sniper unit with special ability to blast off units in range 
Valkyrie Warrior: Valkyrie Hero that spawns when mounted Valkyrie is down, until the return to Valhalla 
Wind Rider: Powerful ranged mounted archer effective in distance 
Partisan: Special heroic civilians ready to defend the Bastion 
Spartan: Elite units of Mars join to reinforce the Bastion 
ImperialGuard: Slow but unyielding elite defensive units of the Bastion 
Peacemaker: Elite guards of Bastion effective against all humans 
AttackWolf: Best friend of players as adorable it is 

New Gods and Mythical Beasts: 
Playable Gods like Thor, Volstagg, Surtr in proper scales and destruction. 
Divine beast like Surtr, Fenrisulfr, Fafnirstrasz. 
Divine warriors like Grootia, Earthshaker. 
Chinese Legends Returned as Special Units: 
HuangZhaowu, HuangZhaowuWife, NvChou. 

Super Weapons & Unique Units: 
GiantSiegeCrossbow: Archaic ICBM from Immortal Pillars 
Devastator: The worst nightmare of structures on wheels 
ColossusOfRhodes: The wonder of Rhodes animated to join ranks 
######## Amphibious demolition vehicle that annihilates units when implodes or gets destroyed, that can also help in fishing 
Solar Barge: Flying Legendary Boat of Ra that rains sunfire missiles from above 
OxCartModelX: Exclusive ox cart that transport units 
Traveler's Ox Cart: Exclusive Ox Cart that serves many benefits to merchants i.e area heal, amphibious transportation, construct The Attractor, fortification with passengers 

CyberTech Units: 
MotherShip, PrismTank, MirageTank, MirrorTank, Igniter, ScoutProbe. 
Trainable at Manor 

Atlantean Captains: 
Captain versions for Arcus, Contarius, Murmillo, Katapeltes, Turma, Destroyer, Fanatic 
Trainable at Manor 

New Buildings: 
Bastion (Advanced Defensive/Training Structure): Trains many exclusive, elite, economic units and researches Bastion military techs. 

Temple Of Primordials: Trains Gods, Legendary Beasts and Super Units 

TechBuilding: Centralized Research Hub for MCMT Techs 

KingdomTech: DwarvenForge and Dock for Dwarves 

MageTower: Special Tower that can fire magic bolts 

Strategic Vessel Assembly: Base of operations for special Naval Units 

AirCommand: Special tower that operates as beacon with sattelite support, defensive structure with damage zone and base of operators with Mr Wukong 

Naval Special Units: 
Desolator: Naval unit equipped with radiactive area and bolts 
Flagship: Strong naval unit that strengthens with passangers and breaks havocs on coasts with carpet bombs 
Navigator: Medium naval unit that can provide a large sight and that can assisst with light cannons 
Scorpion Boat: Fast light naval unit equipped with AA Laser Blasters and effective to cheese enemies with its minigun on the coasts 
Flying Dutchman: Legendary flying undead ship that can summon ghost crews and ghost captain, turn victims into mummies for a short time and launch frozen bolts at anything in the way 
PirateCaptain: Captain of Flying Dutchman 
Blazemaster: Heavy naval unit that can shoot fireballs and send units flying 
Worldbreaker: Super Naval Unit and Mobile Dock with massive passanger availabilty for fortification, serving three cannons specialized for anit-air, anti-building and anti-ship, that also reinforces ####### 
MrWukong: Legendary Monk that provides assistance as the airborne builder and healer on a flying carpet 

New Technologies: 
A wide range of new military, economic, and myth unit upgrades (e.g., Divine Armaments, Nanofiber Platings, Divine Protection, Turret Installation). 
Empowered versions of existing techs for wider and stronger uses (e.g Vibrant Land of MCMT turns all homes, manors, fortress types and armories to proper dropsites types as well as increases work force) 

New Powers & Abilities: 
Custom versions of existing god powers (e.g., Meteor, Frost, Restoration). 
New unit-specific abilities and transformations (e.g Pegasus now has grounded version). 
Unique powers like Orbital Strike. 

Enhancements to Existing Content: 
Unit Scaling: Many existing units (buildings, myth units, heroes) have increased visual scale for a more epic feel (base scaling or tech-activated) 

Civilization Improvements: 
Norse: Valkyries spawn dismounted warriors upon death, various myth units buffed. 
Egyptian: Pharaohs and Priests buffed, Mummy reincarnation mechanics. 
Greek: Hero improvements (Jason, Atalanta, Theseus), Achilles dismounts on death. 
Chinese: Villager Clay variant, hero and myth unit buffs. 
Modified Technologies: Vanilla game technologies like Crenellations, Ballistics, FortifiedTownCenter, and various armory/champion upgrades have been enhanced or expanded. 

Unit Transformations: 
Custom transformations for units like MatsuriYurio (Flight mode). 

UI Enhancements: 
Custom command panel pages for units like Conan and Landlord for easier access to their numerous abilities and build options. 
All units got additional Line Upgrades and Unit Types for logical tech benefits 

General Improvements: 
 
All units got defensive, offensive, ability reworks (e.g Sentinel now fires petrification bolts, Rock Giant is now slower but durable, Argo is now also a warship) 
Various structures got reworks (Sentry Tower now benefits from Wall Techs, House can garrison, Mirror Tower and Lighthouse count as Tower) 
Garrison units now also serve as transportation type 
Various units now have amphibious ability due to physiology or hovering (e.g Frost Giant, Hun Dun and Shade) 
Many units gained impact pushback due to attacks or special attacks (e.g Nemean Lean, Avenger) 
Various units got special reworks (e.g Lampades transforms enemies to exploding chickens, ) 
Various units gained veterancy (e.g WarTurtle spawns as hatchling and grows in size as it battles) 
Some units obtained regenerative or solid shield due to divinity or technology (e.g Greek Heroes, Chinese Heroes Divine Beasts such as Ying Long, Shade) 
Heroes are now stronger in warfare and benefit from LineUpgades. Myth units are reworked and some access LineUpgrades (e.g Centaur). Buildings are reworked and Sentry Towers have deadly boiling oils and cannonballs 
Some military units are now heroes (e.g Myrmidon, Mummy, Einheri) or Siege Units (e.g Mountain Giant, Hekantoires) and some heroes also benefit from Myth techs (e.g Perseus, Polyphemus and Chiron) 
Titans gained different behaviors (e.g Cerberus attacks faster, Ymir hits harder, Xingtian is more durable) 

Fore More:
https://github.com/akinizer/MCMT

modName: najis Quality of Life (QoL) pack 纳祭优化合集
description:
<Additive mod> 
Update: Items marked with * are the changes in this update. 
=========↓↓↓↓↓========= 
【Relic】 
【01】Temples can hold upto 19 relics, and the visual scale of relics is increased.  
【*02】All relic's benefit will be shared among allies. 
【03】Various relic related units have become more worthwhile for late-game use, such as relic Golden Lion being redesigned as a mythical unit which enhanced through age up, but relic monkey will be removed and replace with passive favor income.  
 
【Unit】 
【01】All military units can automatically scout, and original scouts will not acquire this function again.  
【02】Divine immunity units gain 1/s health regen when entering the Age of Wonder. (Such as Yinglong, Shogun, Son Of Osiris) 
 
【Economy】 
【01】All villagers, traders, and fishing boats have been given a smaller collision (still cannot pass through trees), and traders are prohibited from converting herdable animals.  
【02】Mikos mark as idle villager again.  
【03】Herdable animals will have a larger visual scale, faster weight gain, and increased movement speed. (No food capacity increased)  
 
【Building】 
【*01】The health regen aura is enabled for town centers when you researched "Fortified town Center", with an initial rate of 4/s. Various town center related technologies and god powers will further increase regen value.  
 
【AOTG】 
【01】Pharaoh's empower target includes buildings from other civilizations (such as ox-carts).  
【02】The prices of various AOTG benefits that need to be purchased in the market have been reduced according to their strength. 
=========↑↑↑↑↑=========  
This is my personal taste of casual play. Although I strive for balance, it's mainly for comfort play. 
New QoL contents will be continuously added over time. 
 
Feedback: najizhimo@gmail.com 
Searching my ID for more funny mods. 
 
<兼容性模组> 
更新：带*的项目为本次更新项。 
=========↓↓↓↓↓========= 
【圣物】 
【01】神庙可放至多19个圣物，圣物的可视体积增加。 
【*02】所有圣物效果将被共享给盟友。 
【03】圣物单位强化变得值得后期使用，如遗物金狮子重新设计为随时代强化的神话单位，其中遗物猴子直接删除改为更多信仰收入。 
 
【单位】 
【01】所有军事单位可以自动侦查，原本就是侦察兵的单位不会重复获得此功能。 
【02】神圣免疫单位在进入奇迹时代时获得每秒1点的自动回血。（如应龙、将军、欧西里斯之子） 
 
【经济】 
【01】所有村民、商路、渔船获得更小的碰撞体积（依旧不能钻树），所有商路单位禁止转换畜牧动物。 
【02】巫女重新拥有闲置村民标识。 
【03】所有畜牧动物获得更大的可视体积、更快的增肥、更快的移速。（不增加提供的食物） 
 
【建筑】 
【*01】城镇中心在研究了“强化城镇中心”后将开启自动回血，初始4/s，各种城镇中心强化科技、相关神力都会提高回血数值。 
 
【AOTG】 
【01】法老强化包括别的文明的建筑（如牛车）。 
【02】各种需在市场购买的AOTG恩惠的价格按照强度进行了降低。 
=========↑↑↑↑↑=========

modName: Race Full Technologies and Abilities Revamped
description:
This mod allows you to develop all the exclusive upgrades and units of all the major and minor deities of your chosen pantheon, starting from the Classical Age.

For example: if you choose Ra as your major deity, you also have the upgrades and passive abilities of Isis and Set, and after moving to the Classical Age, you can train any Egyptian mythic unit and develop any mythic upgrade.

Ultimately, the choice of deities in each age only affects divine powers.

This mod affects campaign and skirmish play.

Enjoy!

A revamp of the mod "Race Full Technologies and Abilities" (https://www.ageofempires.com/mods/details/396410/):

  • Added the Japanese pantheon

Enhanced AI is a comprehensive AI overhaul for Age of Mythology Retold that fixes the long-standing bug where the AI stops building units and gives up mid-game despite having full resources. After enabling the mod, select the "Enhanced" personality from the AI player dropdown in the lobby to use it. The AI now properly manages its economy, develops cross-island expansion bases into real cities with villagers, defenses, and military buildings, and never sits passively with a massive army at home. It plays an economy-first style, building up and expanding for the first 30 minutes before launching attacks, but will always fight back if engaged. On island maps, the AI builds Town Centers on other islands, gathers local resources, and attempts last-ditch evacuations rather than resigning. Resignation logic has been heavily nerfed so the AI fights to the bitter end. Works with high population mods without requiring them.

modName: Settlers: El olor de la magia (2 vs CPU)
description:
Mapa 6 players donde eres un colono descubriendo un nuevo mundo. Dos jugadores humanos y 4 jugadores inteligencia artificial (CPU)


Sube a tu barco que navega a toda velocidad. Ahora debes explorar y encontrar el lugar que mejor se adapte a ti para construir tu asentamiento y levantar una poderosa civilización para vencer al resto de jugadores que comenzáron en las mismas condiciones de colono que tú.


Este mapa es abundante en recursos. Las minas de oro son infinitas, incluso se dice que nadie conseguirá jamás talar todos sus bosques. 


Casi la totalidad se puede recorrer con unidades terrestres, porque las regiones están muy bien conectadas y disponen de defensas naturales como acantilados o montañas que harán un poco más difícil la invasión enemiga. El mar va a desempeñar un papel muy importante ya que además del alimento, también sirve para acceder a cualquier zona y poder atacar desde las costas. Quien controle el mar tendra ventaja.

This collection of Random Maps adds new ways to play skirmish mode in Age of Mythology Retold.

Colchis (The Golden Fleece): A vast inland sea divides these lands, with fully crossable shallow waters. A small protected island rises at the center, the home of the magical ram Chrysomallos. Capture the Golden Fleece and keep its control to the end to claim victory.

Giza (Shadow of The Colossus): In this mode, your goal is simple: hunt down and defeat the wandering Titan before your enemies do. Inspired by Shadow of the Colossus, each match turns the battlefield into a hunt for a powerful roaming boss instead of a standard supremacy game.

Silent Sanctuary but you are Kamos! 
Play as Kamos in the second mission of the Mythical Battles Campaign!, Kamos has stolen Demeter's golden Cornucopia and brought it deep into the underworld, where Hades keeps Persephone imprisoned, preventing her reunion with her mother. Your objective is to defeat both Orpheus and Chiron, and ultimately destroy the temple that Demeter built for her daughter’s return. 
 
What’s New?: 
This mission is packed with custom content and balance changes, including: 
 
Extensive custom trigger work 
 
Chiron added as an additional enemy 
 
Map Overhaul: Expanded map with additional settlements and terrain adjustments. 
 
Custom Events: New objectives and thematic additions designed by myself and Vamierez. 
 
Gameplay Tip: 
Your ally’s base is on the opposite side of the map, making Underworld Passage a strategic and intriguing option. Because they are closer to Orpheus and Chiron, they will likely take the brunt of the initial attack. Be ready to support them 
 
Be warned: Once Demeter’s Temple falls, her fury will be unleashed. Prepare for her divine punishment! 
 
Credits & Collaboration: 
This Reversed mission is a collaboration between myself and Vamierez. Without Him The Mission wouldn't Be Nearly as Polished as it is I built the foundation and Helped with the initial playtesting, while Vamierez refined the Mission with quality of life improvements, gameplay balancing and Extensive custom trigger work 
 
A massive thank you Goes to Shocolachou for making this mission compatible with the Custom Campaign Menu! 
 
Installation & Technical Notes: 
Install the mod. 
Restart your game. 
Navigate to Campaigns > Custom Campaign Menu to select the mission 
 
IMPORTANT NOTE: There is a Very Minor Bug where a pop-up appears at the start Saying your Going to be Playing as Demeter And asking if you want to play a Greek tutorial Video. We are currently unable to remove this, simply click No and the mission will begin normally. 
 
 
Thoughts of Now and Future: 
We had a blast bringing another Mythical Battles mission to life. While we hope to release more Reversed Campaign missions in the future, the next project will likely be a full campaign, which takes significant time to polish. Thank you for your patience and support! 
 
We Hope you all enjoy this one!

<Additive mod> 
Having an unit levelup system through hustle combat can bring more enjoyment moderately. 
[Warning] This levelup system WILL NOT make units become super strong like playing RPGs, but will instead make them "more efficient", just like a true veterans.  
=========↓↓↓↓↓=========   
Current upgradeable include: all human soldiers, all sieges.  
Excluding heroes, ships, and myth units, as these units are already difficult to kill. Introducing an additional levelup system would severely disrupt the balance.  
In contrast, human soldiers and sieges are relatively easy to kill, even if they have leveluped, so this system encourages players to pay more attention to protecting their own soldiers. 
 
Each unit has an individual levelup threshold, the number is basically multiply their dps by different set value. The multipliers are as follows: melee*10, ranged*30, melee siege*60, ranged siege*100.  
Both melee and ranged units can only gain experience by attacking units, while sieges and units with significant building damage bouns can also obtain experience by attacking buildings.  
 
For example, a ##### ####### who has a base 8 DPS. After dealing 80 damage, he will level up.  
Taking various bonus damage multiplier, corresponding tech, and special skills will significantly accelerate the levelup process.  
 
The upgraded units will have a larger visual scale for distinction (while maintaining the same collision).  
It will provide higher movement speed and health regen, capable for combat efficiency. The regen value is typically limited to 1/s, intended to allow elite troops to recover before entering the next battle, rather than turning them into immortal warriors.  
In addition, attack efficiency will be greatly improved. Under the premise of maintaining the total DPS unchanged, by increasing attack speed, the waste of effective DPS due to overkill can be reduced dramatically  
=========↑↑↑↑↑=========  
The buffs in different units vary, but the fundamental principle remains to "make it more efficient" rather than making it "invincible".  
Units with strong special skills or area attacks may receive special adjustments. 
Atlanteans can be leveluped before they become heroes. 
 
Feedback: najizhimo@gmail.com 
Searching my ID for more funny mods. 
 
<兼容性模组> 
通过战斗让单位自动升级总能在繁忙的战场偶尔增加一些培养精兵的乐趣。 
【注意】这个升级系统并不会让单位变得特别强大仿佛RPG一样，而是变得“更有效率”，即真正的老兵。 
=========↓↓↓↓↓=========  
目前可升级目标：所有人类士兵、所有攻城武器。 
不包括英雄、船只、神兽，这是由于这些单位本来就特别难以击杀，如果还加入额外的升级系统将严重破坏平衡。 
而人类士兵和攻城武器即便升级了都相对容易被击杀，这个系统相当于鼓励玩家保护好自己的士兵。 
 
每个单位都单独设定了对应的升级阈值，基本按照基础DPS的倍数来计算升级所需经验，倍数如下：近战*10、远程*30、近战攻城*60、远程攻城*100。 
其中近战和远程单位都只能通过攻击单位来获得经验，而攻城单位或者对建筑优势的单位则还可以通过攻击建筑获得经验。 
 
例如一个希腊重甲兵，基础DPS为8点，那么在其造成了80点伤害后就会升级。 
算上克制伤害加成、科技升级，以及特殊技能都能大幅加速这个过程。 
 
升级后的单位会获得更大的视觉体积来区分（实际碰撞不变）。 
有着更高的移速和回血能力来提高参战速度，回血数值一般仅为1秒，其用意是让精兵在进入下一次战斗前恢复好状态，并不是让他们变成不死战神。 
此外攻击效率还会大幅度提升，在总DPS不变的前提下，通过大幅增加攻速从而降低过量击杀浪费有效DPS。 
=========↑↑↑↑↑========= 
不同单位的加成都各不相同，基础理念依旧是“变得好用”，而不是变得“无敌”。 
个别有着强大技能的单位、或者范围攻击的单位会有特殊修正。 
亚特兰蒂斯的单位没变英雄前可以升级。 
 
反馈: najizhimo@gmail.com
